It speculates on the implications of discovering alien life but explicitly states that scientific consensus finds such a possibility in our solar system negligible. It also offers mundane interpretations for phenomena that 'flying saucer advocates' might misinterpret. Therefore, it provides no evidence of an actual UAP encounter.
bust_reasoning_zh: 本文件是一份1963年的政策讨论文件，而非事件报告。它推测了发现外星生命的影响，但明确指出科学共识认为在太阳系内存在此类可能微乎其微。它还对“飞碟倡导者”可能误解的现象提供了平凡解释。因此，它未提供实际UAP遭遇的证据。
claims: The possibility of encountering alien intelligence, though scientifically improbable within our solar system, should not be entirely ignored. Modern scientific theory suggests planetary systems and the spontaneous emergence of life are common throughout the galaxy. Speculation exists regarding intelligent life on Mars (e.g., "Canali," moon mining) and the possibility of Martian artificial space stations. Interstellar travel, even at sub-light speeds, could allow a civilization to colonize the galaxy within 200,000 years. Encountering an alien race would necessitate rapid assessment of their technological capabilities (chemical, nuclear, or faster-than-light space flight) to inform diplomatic policy. The discovery of alien intelligence would be a "bigger problem" for humanity than its self-created issues, requiring a unified human response.
claims_zh: 尽管在太阳系内科学上可能性微乎其微，但遭遇外星智慧生命的可能性不应被完全忽视。 现代科学理论表明，行星系统和生命的自发出现普遍存在于整个银河系。 关于火星上存在智慧生命（例如“运河”、月球采矿）以及火星人造空间站的可能性存在推测。 即使以亚光速进行星际旅行，一个文明也可能在20万年内殖民整个银河系。 遭遇外星种族将需要迅速评估其技术能力（化学、核能或超光速太空飞行），以便制定外交政策。 发现外星智慧生命对人类而言将是比其自身造成的问题“更大的问题”，需要人类采取统一应对。

title: 65_HS1-834228961_62-HQ-83894_Serial_438
summary: An FBI report detailing the April 24, 1964, Socorro, New Mexico incident where Officer Lonnie Zamora observed a shiny, aluminum-white object with an insignia, accompanied by two small humanoid figures in white coveralls. The object, initially mistaken for an overturned car, took off with a loud roar and blue/orange flame, leaving behind four rectangular indentations, burned grass, and circular marks on the ground. Zamora's account is corroborated by physical evidence found at the site.
summary_zh: 一份联邦调查局报告，详细描述了1964年4月24日发生在新墨西哥州索科罗的事件。警官隆尼·萨莫拉观察到一个闪亮的铝白色物体，带有徽章，并伴有两名身着白色工作服的矮小人形生物。该物体最初被误认为一辆翻倒的汽车，随后伴随着巨大的轰鸣声和蓝/橙色火焰起飞，在地面留下四个矩形凹痕、烧焦的草地和圆形标记。萨莫拉的陈述得到现场发现的物理证据证实。
bust_reasoning: The bust score is low due to the convergence of multiple strong indicators against mundane explanations. A credible witness (police officer Zamora, described as 'sober, industrious, and conscientious' and 'not given to fantasy') observed a shiny, aluminum-white object with an insignia and two 'persons in white coveralls'. The event included distinct auditory phenomena (thumps, a roaring sound changing frequency, and a sharp whine) and left significant physical traces (four rectangular indentations, three burned patches of grass, and three circular marks) that were immediately corroborated by an FBI agent and other law enforcement officers. The object's behavior, including a slow vertical ascent followed by very fast, low-altitude horizontal flight, is incompatible with known conventional craft or simple misidentification. The document itself does not offer any mundane explanation.
bust_reasoning_zh: 驳斥评分较低，因为存在多项有力证据，与世俗解释相悖。一名可信证人（警官萨莫拉，被描述为“清醒、勤奋、尽职”且“不爱幻想”）观察到一个闪亮的铝白色物体，带有徽章，以及两名“身着白色工作服的人员”。该事件包括独特的听觉现象（砰砰声、频率变化的轰鸣声和尖锐的嗡嗡声），并留下显著的物理痕迹（四个矩形凹痕、三块烧焦的草地和三个圆形标记），这些痕迹立即得到联邦调查局特工和其他执法人员的证实。该物体的行为，包括缓慢垂直上升后进行极快的低空水平飞行，与已知的常规飞行器或简单的误认不符。文件本身未提供任何世俗解释。
claims: Officer Lonnie Zamora observed a shiny, aluminum-white object. Two people in white coveralls were seen near the object. The object took off with a loud roar and blue/orange flame. Physical evidence at the site included four rectangular indentations, burned grass, and three circular marks. The object had an insignia.
claims_zh: 警官隆尼·萨莫拉观察到一个闪亮的铝白色物体。 在物体附近看到两名身着白色工作服的人员。 该物体伴随着巨大的轰鸣声和蓝/橙色火焰起飞。 现场的物理证据包括四个矩形凹痕、烧焦的草地和三个圆形标记。 该物体带有徽章。

title: NASA-UAP-D3, Gemini 7 Transcript, 1965
title_zh: 美国国家航空航天局-未识别空中现象-D3，双子座7号飞行记录，1965年
summary: A transcript of communications from the Gemini 7 spaceflight in 1965, documenting Astronauts Frank Borman and James Lovell's observations. Borman reported a "bogey" at "ten o'clock high" and "hundreds of little particles" estimated at three to four miles away, which appeared to be going into polar orbit. Lovell described observing a "brilliant body in the sun against a black background with trillions of particles on it," observed ahead at his two o'clock position and slowly tumbling. The document includes handwritten notes titled "UFO SIGHTING BY BORMAN".
summary_zh: 本文件系1965年双子座7号太空飞行期间的通信记录，其中记载了宇航员弗兰克·博尔曼和詹姆斯·洛弗尔的观测情况。博尔曼报告在“十点钟高位”发现一个“不明目标”（bogey），并观测到“数百个小颗粒”，估计距离三到四英里，这些颗粒似乎正在进入极地轨道。洛弗尔描述观测到一个“在阳光下、黑色背景中闪耀的物体，上面有数万亿个颗粒”，该物体在其两点钟方向前方被观测到，并缓慢翻滚。该文件包含题为“博尔曼观测到UFO”的手写笔记。
bust_reasoning: The bust score is high because the astronauts themselves provide mundane explanations for the observations. Borman quickly clarifies the 'bogey' as 'debris' and 'hundreds of little particles'. Lovell then identifies the 'brilliant body' as 'the booster' and notes it is surrounded by 'trillions of particles'. These direct statements from the witnesses strongly point to known space objects and phenomena.
bust_reasoning_zh: 此次事件的破解可能性较高，原因在于宇航员本人对观测结果提供了世俗解释。博尔曼迅速澄清“不明目标”为“碎片”和“数百个小颗粒”。洛弗尔随后将“闪耀物体”识别为“助推器”，并指出其周围环绕着“数万亿个颗粒”。这些来自目击者的直接陈述有力地指向了已知的空间物体和现象。
claims: Astronaut Borman sighted a "bogey" (unidentified object) Astronaut Borman observed "hundreds of little particles" at 3-4 miles distance Astronaut Lovell observed a "brilliant body" with "trillions of particles on it"
claims_zh: 宇航员博尔曼观测到一个“不明目标”（bogey） 宇航员博尔曼观测到距离3-4英里处有“数百个小颗粒” 宇航员洛弗尔观测到一个附有“数万亿个颗粒”的“闪耀物体”

title: 255_t_763_r1b_transcripts
summary: An excerpt from the Gemini VII mission transcript, highlighting the segment where Astronaut Frank Borman reports seeing an unidentified object, referred to as a "bogey," at "ten o'clock high." Astronauts Borman and Jim Lovell also observe numerous small particles, described as "hundreds" or "millions," and the booster, which is seen "slowly tumbling" and as a "brilliant body." The particles are reported to be going into a polar orbit.
summary_zh: 双子座七号任务记录的摘录，重点介绍了宇航员弗兰克·博尔曼报告看到一个不明物体，被称为“不明飞行物”（bogey），位于“十点钟高位”。宇航员博尔曼和吉姆·洛弗尔还观察到大量小颗粒，被描述为“数百个”或“数百万个”，以及助推器，该助推器被看到“缓慢翻滚”并呈“明亮物体”状。据报告，这些颗粒正在进入极地轨道。
bust_reasoning: The document describes a 'bogey' observed by astronauts Borman and Lovell, explicitly stated to be an 'unidentified object' and distinct from both the booster and the 'hundreds of little particles' (debris). While the witnesses are highly credible, the 'bogey' is only described by its relative position ('ten o'clock high') without any detailed kinematics or anomalous behavior that would resist a mundane explanation. The document itself does not provide a specific prosaic identification for this 'bogey,' placing it in the 'genuinely uncertain' category. The lack of multi-sensor data or highly anomalous behavior prevents a lower score, but its explicit 'unidentified' status by trained observers prevents a higher one.
bust_reasoning_zh: 该文件描述了宇航员博尔曼和洛弗尔观察到的一个“不明飞行物”（bogey），明确指出其为“不明物体”，且与助推器和“数百个小颗粒”（碎片）均不同。尽管目击者高度可信，但该“不明飞行物”仅通过其相对位置（“十点钟高位”）进行描述，缺乏详细的运动学特征或异常行为，无法排除普通解释。文件本身并未对该“不明飞行物”提供具体的世俗解释，将其归类为“确实不确定”。缺乏多传感器数据或高度异常行为使其无法获得较低评分，但受过训练的观察员明确将其列为“未识别”则阻止了较高评分。
claims: Astronaut Frank Borman sighted an unidentified object, a "bogey." Astronauts Borman and Lovell observed numerous small particles. The particles were estimated to be 3-4 miles away and going into polar orbit. The booster was also in sight, described as a "brilliant body" and "slowly tumbling."
claims_zh: 宇航员弗兰克·博尔曼目击到一个不明物体，即一个“不明飞行物”（bogey）。 宇航员博尔曼和洛弗尔观察到大量小颗粒。 这些颗粒估计距离3-4英里，并正在进入极地轨道。 助推器也在视野内，被描述为“明亮物体”并“缓慢翻滚”。

title: NASA-UAP-D1, Apollo 12 Transcript, 1969
summary: This document is an excerpt from the Apollo 12 Technical Air-to-Ground Voice Transcription, November 1969, highlighting two periods where astronauts reported observing unidentified phenomena. On Day 5, Lunar Module Pilot Alan L. Bean observed particles and flashes of light "sailing off in space" and "escaping the Moon" via the Alignment Optical Telescope. On Day 6, Mission Commander Charles "Pete" Conrad observed floating debris outside the lunar module, which he initially saw illuminated by the module's onboard tracking light, later assessing the light had burned out.
summary_zh: 本文件摘录自1969年11月《阿波罗12号技术天地通话记录》，重点阐述宇航员报告观测到不明现象的两个时段。在第5天，登月舱驾驶员艾伦·L·比恩通过对准光学望远镜观测到光粒子和闪光“在太空中飘离”并“脱离月球”。在第6天，任务指令长查尔斯·“皮特”·康拉德观测到登月舱外部有漂浮碎片，他最初看到这些碎片被登月舱的机载跟踪灯照亮，随后判断该灯已烧毁。
bust_reasoning: The bust score is 75 because the primary witness (LMP-LM) explicitly considers a mundane source for the 'particles of light, flashes of light' by stating, 'I was thinking they're dropping from my water boiler.' This is further supported by CDR-LM's description of 'little bits and pieces floating along with us.' While LMP-LM also notes they 'look like some of those things are escaping the Moon' and 'really haul out of here,' suggesting motion that resists the initial mundane explanation, this is a subjective interpretation of small particles in a vacuum. There is no multi-sensor convergence on anomalous kinematics that would strongly resist the prosaic explanation of spacecraft-generated debris or effluent.
bust_reasoning_zh: 驳斥评分为75，原因在于主要目击者（登月舱驾驶员）明确考虑了“光粒子、闪光”的普通来源，他表示：“我当时在想它们是不是从我的热水器里掉出来的。”登月舱指令长对“与我们一同漂浮的小碎片”的描述进一步支持了这一点。尽管登月舱驾驶员也指出它们“看起来有些东西正在脱离月球”并“真正地从这里加速离开”，这暗示了某种运动，似乎与最初的普通解释相悖，但这只是对真空中小颗粒的主观解读。没有多传感器数据汇聚表明存在异常运动学特征，能够有力驳斥航天器产生碎片或排放物的平淡解释。
claims: LMP-LM Alan L. Bean observed particles and flashes of light "sailing off in space" and "escaping the Moon" through the Alignment Optical Telescope (AOT). CDR-LM Charles "Pete" Conrad observed floating debris outside the lunar module. The observed debris was initially seen illuminated by the LM's onboard tracking light. Conrad assessed that the tracking light had burned out because he could no longer see the debris illuminated.
claims_zh: 登月舱驾驶员艾伦·L·比恩通过对准光学望远镜（AOT）观测到光粒子和闪光“在太空中飘离”并“脱离月球”。 登月舱指令长查尔斯·“皮特”·康拉德观测到登月舱外部有漂浮碎片。 所观测到的碎片最初被登月舱的机载跟踪灯照亮。 康拉德判断跟踪灯已烧毁，因为他无法再看到被照亮的碎片。

title: NASA-UAP-D4, Apollo 11 Technical Crew Debriefing, 1969
title_zh: 美国国家航空航天局UAP-D4，阿波罗11号技术乘员汇报，1969年
summary: This document is an excerpt from the Apollo 11 Technical Crew Debriefing (Volumes 1 and 2) from July 31, 1969, detailing three unusual observations made by the crew during the mission. First, a sizeable object was observed on the way to the Moon, described with various shapes including L-shaped, open-suitcase-like, two connected rings, or a hollow cylinder, which the crew speculated could be the S-IVB stage or debris from the spacecraft. Second, flashes of light were seen inside the cabin, possibly caused by atomic particle penetration. Third, a fairly bright light source was sighted from lunar orbit and on the return trip, initially thought to be a laser, but later concluded to be a reflection of the Sun from a body of water on Earth.
summary_zh: 本文件摘自1969年7月31日的《阿波罗11号技术乘员汇报》（第一卷和第二卷），详细记录了乘员在任务期间的三项异常观测。首先，在前往月球途中观测到一个尺寸可观的物体，形态各异，包括L形、类似打开的行李箱、两个相连的环或中空圆柱体，乘员推测其可能为S-IVB级火箭或航天器碎片。其次，在舱内观测到闪光，可能由原子粒子穿透引起。第三，在月球轨道和返程途中观测到一个相当明亮的光源，最初被认为是激光，但后来认定为地球水体对太阳光的反射。
bust_reasoning: The document itself provides strong mundane explanations for all three observations. The Apollo 11 crew actively debriefed and concluded that the first object was likely spacecraft debris, the second observation was consistent with atomic particle interactions (cosmic ray phosphenes), and the third was sunlight reflecting off water. These are either explicitly identified prosaic sources or highly plausible mundane explanations consistent with the crew's own theories.
bust_reasoning_zh: 文件本身为所有三项观测提供了有力的世俗解释。阿波罗11号乘员积极汇报并得出结论：第一个物体可能是航天器碎片；第二次观测与原子粒子相互作用（宇宙射线闪光幻影）相符；第三次观测是太阳光从水面反射。这些要么是明确识别的普通来源，要么是与乘员自身理论相符的高度合理的世俗解释。
claims: Crew observed a sizeable object on the way to the Moon, initially thought to be the S-IVB stage or spacecraft debris. Crew observed flashes of light inside the cabin, possibly caused by atomic particle penetration. Crew observed a bright light source from lunar orbit/return trip, initially thought to be a laser, later believed to be sun reflection off water.
claims_zh: 乘员在前往月球途中观测到一个尺寸可观的物体，最初被认为是S-IVB级火箭或航天器碎片。 乘员在舱内观测到闪光，可能由原子粒子穿透引起。 乘员在月球轨道/返程途中观测到一个明亮光源，最初被认为是激光，后来被认为是太阳光从水面反射。

title: NASA-UAP-D2, Apollo 17 Transcript, 1972
title_zh: NASA-UAP-D2, 阿波罗17号任务记录, 1972年
summary: The Apollo 17 mission transcript details three periods of observed unidentified phenomena. On Day 00, CMP Ronald Evans and LMP Harrison 'Jack' Schmitt reported 'very bright particles or fragments' drifting and tumbling near the spacecraft, speculating they were ice or paint from the S-IVB. On Day 02, CDR Eugene A. Cernan observed 'streaks' and an 'intense light flashing' like a train headlight, later describing 'flashing, rotating phenomenon' as physical objects in space. LMP Schmitt also observed similar phenomena, attributing them to the S-IVB. Cernan later saw two distant flashing objects, assessed as SLA panels. On Day 03, LMP Schmitt observed a 'flash on the lunar surface' north of the Grimaldi crater.
summary_zh: 阿波罗17号任务记录详述了三个时段内观测到的不明现象。在第00天，指挥舱驾驶员罗纳德·埃文斯和登月舱驾驶员哈里森·“杰克”·施密特报告称观测到“非常明亮的粒子或碎片”在航天器附近漂浮和翻滚，推测其为S-IVB级火箭的冰块或油漆碎片。在第02天，指挥官尤金·A·塞尔南观测到“条纹”和“像火车头灯一样强烈闪烁的光”，随后将其描述为“闪烁、旋转现象”，即太空中的实体物体。登月舱驾驶员施密特也观测到类似现象，并将其归因于S-IVB级火箭。塞尔南随后看到两个远距离闪烁的物体，评估为SLA面板。在第03天，登月舱驾驶员施密特观测到“月球表面的一道闪光”在格里马尔迪陨石坑以北。
bust_reasoning: The document provides strong, explicit, and repeated mundane explanations from the astronauts themselves. Initial observations of 'very bright particles or fragments' are attributed to 'ice chunks, possibly. Or maybe there's paint coming off of it' from the S-IVB. Later, a 'very bright spot that flashed' and 'bright object, and it's obviously rotating because it's flashing' is identified by the Lunar Module Pilot (LMP) as 'the S-IVB' and specifically explained as 'the side and - of the S-IVB - and then the engine bell, Gene,' accounting for the 'bright flash; and then you get a dull flash.' The Commander (CDR) later suggests 'SLA panels' for two distant flashing objects. The astronauts are actively engaged in identifying these objects as known mission-related hardware or debris.
bust_reasoning_zh: 该文件提供了宇航员本人明确、重复且世俗的解释。最初观测到的“非常明亮的粒子或碎片”被归因于S-IVB级火箭的“可能是冰块。或者可能是油漆脱落”。随后，登月舱驾驶员（LMP）将“一个闪烁的非常明亮的斑点”和“一个明亮的物体，它显然在旋转因为它在闪烁”识别为“S-IVB级火箭”，并具体解释为“S-IVB级火箭的侧面和——然后是发动机喷口，吉恩”，这解释了“明亮的闪光；然后是暗淡的闪光”。指挥官（CDR）随后提出，两个远距离闪烁的物体是“SLA面板”。宇航员积极地将这些物体识别为已知的任务相关硬件或碎片。
claims: Astronauts observed 'very bright particles or fragments' drifting and tumbling near the spacecraft. Astronauts observed 'streaks' and an 'intense light flashing' like a train headlight. Astronauts observed 'flashing, rotating phenomenon' assessed as 'physical objects in space'. Astronauts observed two distant 'flashing objects'. LMP Schmitt observed a 'flash on the lunar surface'.
claims_zh: 宇航员观测到“非常明亮的粒子或碎片”在航天器附近漂浮和翻滚。 宇航员观测到“条纹”和“像火车头灯一样强烈闪烁的光”。 宇航员观测到“闪烁、旋转现象”，并评估为“太空中的实体物体”。 宇航员观测到两个远距离的“闪烁物体”。 登月舱驾驶员施密特观测到“月球表面的一道闪光”。

title: NASA-UAP-D5, Apollo 17 Crew Debriefing for Science, 1973
title_zh: 美国国家航空航天局-UAP-D5，阿波罗17号乘员科学汇报，1973年
summary: This document is an excerpt from the Apollo 17 Crew Debriefing for Science on January 8, 1973. Dick Henry, co-investigator on the ultraviolet experiment, discusses unexpected results, including an observed UV spectrum at high galactic latitudes that resembles a hot star spectrum despite no hot stars being in the field of view. This phenomenon is considered potentially extragalactic radiation, with further computer study required. The debriefing also mentions an unexpected X-ray background and gamma-ray background.
summary_zh: 本文件摘自1973年1月8日阿波罗17号乘员科学汇报。紫外线实验的共同研究员迪克·亨利讨论了意料之外的结果，其中包括在高银纬观测到的紫外光谱，该光谱类似于热星光谱，尽管视场内没有热星。这种现象被认为是潜在的河外辐射，需进一步的计算机研究。此次汇报还提及了意料之外的X射线背景和伽马射线背景。
bust_reasoning: The document describes observations of cosmic background radiation and UV spectra, not a discrete physical UAP. The 'mystery' is purely scientific, concerning the origin and characteristics of these astrophysical phenomena. The document itself provides and discusses known astrophysical explanations, such as reflected starlight or extragalactic radiation, making it a very high bust score as the 'object' is a cosmic background and the explanations are within the realm of astrophysics.
bust_reasoning_zh: 该文件描述的是对宇宙背景辐射和紫外光谱的观测，而非离散的物理UAP。该“谜团”纯属科学范畴，涉及这些天体物理现象的起源和特征。文件本身提供了并讨论了已知的天体物理学解释，例如反射星光或河外辐射，鉴于“物体”是宇宙背景且解释属于天体物理学范畴，因此其“揭穿”可能性极高。
claims: An X-ray background was observed over the sky that nobody had expected. A UV spectrum was observed at high galactic latitudes that looks like a hot star spectrum, but no hot stars were within the field of view. The most conservative interpretation for the UV spectrum is light from hot stars in the galactic plane reflecting off interstellar dust, but certain characteristics don't fit this theory. It is at least possible that the observed UV spectrum is extragalactic radiation. Detailed computer study is needed to understand the UV spectrum, which will take a long time.
claims_zh: 天空中观测到无人预期的X射线背景。 在高银纬观测到类似于热星光谱的紫外光谱，但视场内没有热星。 对于紫外光谱最保守的解释是银河平面热星光线经星际尘埃反射，但某些特征不符合此理论。 观测到的紫外光谱至少有可能是河外辐射。 需进行详细的计算机研究以理解紫外光谱，这将耗时甚久。

title: 255_413270_UFO's_and_Defense_What_Should_we_Prepare_For
title_zh: 255_413270_不明飞行物与国防：我们应作何准备
summary: This document contains an independent report on UFOs written by the French association COMETA, detailing a study by the Institute of Higher Studies for National Defence, originally published in the French magazine VSD in July 1999. It is accompanied by a letter from Carol Rosin, spokesperson for Wernher von Braun, dated April 30, 2001, addressed to 'Dan' (likely Dan Goldin, then NASA Administrator). The report aims to provide a dispassionate examination of UFO phenomena, presenting facts and testimonies from pilots and ground observers, evaluating existing research by GEPAN/SEPRA, and discussing the strategic, aeronautical, scientific, technical, political, religious, and media implications, particularly concerning the extraterrestrial hypothesis.
summary_zh: 本文件包含一份由法国COMETA协会撰写的关于不明飞行物的独立报告，详细阐述了国防高级研究所的一项研究，该报告最初于1999年7月在法国杂志VSD上发表。随附一封由沃纳·冯·布劳恩的发言人卡罗尔·罗辛于2001年4月30日致“丹”（很可能是时任美国国家航空航天局局长丹·戈尔丁）的信函。该报告旨在对不明飞行物现象进行客观审视，呈现飞行员和地面观察员的事实与证词，评估GEPAN/SEPRA的现有研究，并讨论其战略、航空、科学、技术、政治、宗教和媒体影响，特别是关于地外假说。
bust_reasoning: The bust score is low because the document, an independent report by high-level French defense and scientific experts, describes multi-sensor (visual and radar) and multi-witness (pilots, ATC) cases with highly anomalous behaviors. These include 'supersonic speed without sonic boom,' 'changing shape,' 'disappearing almost instantaneously,' and intelligent maneuvers, which are explicitly stated as 'completely unexplained despite the abundance and quality of data.' The report's premise is to address phenomena that resist easy mundane explanations.
bust_reasoning_zh: 驳斥得分较低，原因在于该文件作为一份由法国高级国防和科学专家撰写的独立报告，描述了多传感器（视觉和雷达）和多目击者（飞行员、空管）案例，其中包含高度异常的行为。这些行为包括“超音速飞行而无音爆”、“改变形状”、“几乎瞬间消失”以及智能机动，这些行为被明确指出“尽管数据丰富且质量高，但仍完全无法解释”。该报告的前提是探讨那些难以用普通解释来驳斥的现象。
claims: UFO phenomena are real and often remain unexplained despite abundant and quality data. Some sightings involve objects landing on the ground, with physical traces. Civilian and military pilot testimonies are often corroborated by radar recordings. The extraterrestrial hypothesis should be seriously considered as a possible origin for some phenomena. UFOs raise concrete problems for national defense and require adapted responses and information for pilots, the public, and decision-makers. The report recommends developing the actions of SEPRA and promoting supplemental scientific monitoring and research.
claims_zh: 不明飞行物现象真实存在，尽管数据丰富且质量高，但通常仍无法解释。 部分目击事件涉及物体着陆地面，并留下物理痕迹。 民用和军用飞行员的证词常与雷达记录相互印证。 地外假说应被认真考虑为某些现象的可能起源。 不明飞行物对国防构成具体问题，需要为飞行员、公众和决策者提供适应性应对措施和信息。 报告建议发展SEPRA的行动，并促进补充性的科学监测和研究。

title: State Department UAP Cable 1, Papua New Guinea, January 28, 1985
title_zh: 美国国务院UAP电报1，巴布亚新几内亚，1985年1月28日
summary: This document is a U.S. Department of State diplomatic cable from the U.S. Embassy in Port Moresby, Papua New Guinea, to USCINCPAC on January 28, 1985. It reports an informal inquiry from the PNG National Intelligence Organization (NIO) concerning reported sightings of high-altitude, high-speed aircraft over PNG on the evening of January 24. Local residents were reportedly frightened by overflights, leading to a public meeting. The NIO relayed various reports of unidentified aerial phenomena, including fast-moving objects with lights, contrails, and noise. An Air Niugini pilot's radar reportedly picked up aircraft flying south to north at high altitude and high speed. The U.S. Embassy informed the NIO that it had no record of B-52 overflights or U.S. aircraft in PNG airspace on that date and sought confirmation and further information from USCINCPAC.
summary_zh: 本文件系美国国务院一份外交电报，由美国驻巴布亚新几内亚莫尔兹比港大使馆于1985年1月28日发往美国太平洋司令部。该电报报告了巴布亚新几内亚国家情报组织（NIO）的一项非正式问询，内容涉及1月24日晚间在巴布亚新几内亚上空报告的高空高速飞行器目击事件。据报当地居民因飞行器飞越而感到恐慌，并因此召开了公众会议。NIO转达了多起不明空中现象报告，包括带有灯光、凝结尾迹和噪音的快速移动物体。据报，新几内亚航空公司一名飞行员的雷达探测到有飞行器在高空高速从南向北飞行。美国大使馆告知NIO，当日巴布亚新几内亚领空内没有B-52轰炸机飞越或美国飞机活动的记录，并向USCINCPAC寻求确认和进一步信息。
bust_reasoning: The bust score is 45 because the document reports multi-sensor (radar and visual) and multi-witness (Air Niugini pilot, NIO, local residents) convergence on high-altitude, high-speed objects with contrails and lights. The US explicitly denied any of its aircraft were involved, and the request for 'any light' on the reports suggests they had no immediate mundane explanation. However, the document itself notes the information is 'very sketchy' and sources were 'unsure of the directions,' which prevents a lower score, as a non-US conventional aircraft remains a plausible, though unconfirmed, explanation.
bust_reasoning_zh: 驳斥评分为45，原因在于该文件报告了多传感器（雷达和视觉）及多目击者（新几内亚航空公司飞行员、NIO、当地居民）对带有凝结尾迹和灯光的高空高速物体存在一致性。美国明确否认其任何飞机涉事，且其要求对报告提供“任何线索”表明他们没有即时的世俗解释。然而，文件本身指出信息“非常粗略”，且消息来源“不确定方向”，这使得评分无法更低，因为非美国常规飞机仍是一种合理但未经证实的解释。
claims: PNG National Intelligence Organization (NIO) inquired about reported sightings of high-altitude, high-speed aircraft over PNG on January 24, 1985. Local residents were frightened by overflights, leading to a public meeting. Reports included fast-moving objects with lights, contrails, and noise. An Air Niugini pilot's radar detected aircraft flying south to north at high altitude and high speed. Visual sightings of contrails were reported from various points around PNG. The U.S. Embassy stated no known B-52 overflights or U.S. aircraft were in PNG airspace on January 24.
claims_zh: 巴布亚新几内亚国家情报组织（NIO）问询了1985年1月24日在巴布亚新几内亚上空报告的高空高速飞行器目击事件。 当地居民因飞行器飞越而感到恐慌，并因此召开了公众会议。 报告中包括带有灯光、凝结尾迹和噪音的快速移动物体。 新几内亚航空公司一名飞行员的雷达探测到有飞行器在高空高速从南向北飞行。 巴布亚新几内亚各地报告了凝结尾迹的目视目击事件。 美国大使馆声明，1月24日巴布亚新几内亚领空内没有已知的B-52轰炸机飞越或美国飞机。

title: State Department UAP Cable 2, Kazakhstan, January 31, 1994
title_zh: 美国国务院UAP电报2号，哈萨克斯坦，1994年1月31日
summary: On January 27, 1994, Tajik Air Chief Pilot Ed Rhodes, an American citizen, and two American pilot colleagues encountered a UFO while flying a Boeing 747SP at 41,000 feet over Kazakhstan. The object appeared as a bright light of enormous intensity, approaching from the east at great speed and higher altitude. It performed maneuvers including circles, corkscrews, and 90-degree turns at rapid rates of speed and high G's. Captain Rhodes took several photos. The object was described as resembling a bullet in flight due to its light emission. It left contrails estimated at 100,000 feet, an altitude too high for ordinary aircraft to produce them. The crew believed the object was extraterrestrial and under intelligent control. The State Department reported the incident without offering an opinion.
summary_zh: 1994年1月27日，塔吉克航空首席飞行员埃德·罗兹（美国公民）及其两名美国籍飞行员同事在驾驶一架波音747SP飞机于哈萨克斯坦上空41,000英尺高度飞行时，遭遇不明飞行物（UFO）。该物体呈现为一道极其明亮的强光，从东方以极高速度和更高海拔接近。其执行了包括盘旋、螺旋飞行和90度转弯等机动动作，速度极快且承受高G力。罗兹机长拍摄了数张照片。该物体因其发光而被描述为类似于飞行中的子弹。其留下了据估计在100,000英尺高度的凝结尾迹，此高度远超普通飞机产生凝结尾迹的上限。机组人员认为该物体为地外来源且受智能控制。美国国务院报告了此事件，但未发表任何意见。
bust_reasoning: The report involves three experienced commercial pilots observing a UAP for 40 minutes, describing complex, high-G maneuvers (circles, corkscrews, 90-degree turns) and leaving contrails at an estimated 100,000 feet. The pilots explicitly ruled out meteors and stated that contrails at that altitude are impossible for ordinary aircraft, indicating behavior incompatible with known prosaic explanations. The multi-witness convergence and specific details of kinematics and signature resist easy mundane explanation, placing it in the 15-34 score range.
bust_reasoning_zh: 该报告涉及三名经验丰富的商业飞行员对UAP进行了40分钟的观察，描述了复杂的、高G力的机动动作（盘旋、螺旋飞行、90度转弯），并在据估计100,000英尺高度留下凝结尾迹。飞行员明确排除了流星的可能性，并指出普通飞机不可能在该高度产生凝结尾迹，表明其行为与已知的普通解释不符。多名目击者证词的一致性以及运动学和特征的具体细节，使得简单的世俗解释难以成立，将其置于15-34分的评分范围。
claims: UFO encountered by pilots at 41,000 feet over Kazakhstan Object was a bright light of enormous intensity Object performed rapid maneuvers including circles, corkscrews, and 90-degree turns Object left contrails at an estimated 100,000 feet, too high for ordinary aircraft Witnesses believed the object was extraterrestrial and under intelligent control Photos were taken of the object
claims_zh: 飞行员在哈萨克斯坦上空41,000英尺处遭遇不明飞行物 该物体为一道极其明亮的强光 该物体执行了包括盘旋、螺旋飞行和90度转弯在内的快速机动动作 该物体在据估计100,000英尺高度留下凝结尾迹，此高度远超普通飞机产生凝结尾迹的上限 目击者认为该物体为地外来源且受智能控制 已拍摄该物体的照片

title: DOW-UAP-D48, Department of the Air Force Report, 1996
summary: This report describes the Modeling of Unlikely Space-Booster Failures in Risk Calculations, documenting historical launch failure modes and recommending corrective actions to address them using novel modelling techniques.
summary_zh: 本报告阐述了风险计算中不太可能发生的航天助推器故障建模，记录了历史发射故障模式，并建议采用新颖的建模技术来解决这些问题。
bust_reasoning: The document is a technical report titled "Modeling Unlikely Space-Booster Failures in Risk Calculations." It focuses on risk analysis for missile and space-vehicle launches and does not contain any UAP observation narrative, sensor data, or witness accounts. Therefore, it is not assessable for mundane explanations of a UAP.
bust_reasoning_zh: 该文件是一份题为“风险计算中不太可能发生的航天助推器故障建模”的技术报告。其侧重于导弹和航天器发射的风险分析，且不包含任何UAP观测叙述、传感器数据或目击者证词。因此，无法对其进行UAP世俗解释的评估。
claims: Modeling of Mode-5 failure responses for space-boosters in risk calculations Estimation of probabilities of occurrence for less-likely failures Determination of optimum values for shaping constants of impact-density functions Development of absolute failure probabilities for Atlas, Delta, and Titan Development of relative probabilities of occurrence for all failure-response modes for Atlas, Delta, Titan, LLV1, and other new launch systems
claims_zh: 风险计算中航天助推器模式5故障响应建模 估算不太可能发生的故障的发生概率 确定冲击密度函数形状常数的最佳值 开发Atlas、Delta和Titan的绝对故障概率 开发Atlas、Delta、Titan、LLV1及其他新型发射系统所有故障响应模式的相对发生概率

title: DOW-UAP-D49, Launch Summary, Vandenberg AFB, 2000
title_zh: DOW-UAP-D49, 发射概要, 范登堡空军基地, 2000年
summary: This report summarizes the historical record of all major launch operations conducted from Vandenberg Air Force Base, California, between 1958 and 2000. It serves as an official registry of launches presented in chronological order.
summary_zh: 本报告概述了1958年至2000年期间在加利福尼亚州范登堡空军基地进行的所有主要发射行动的历史记录。本报告作为按时间顺序排列的官方发射登记册。
bust_reasoning: This document is a 'Launch Summary' from Vandenberg AFB's Office of History, detailing known launch operations from 1958-2000. It is a purely administrative and historical record, containing no narrative of any observed phenomenon, no witness accounts, no sensor data, and no description of any unidentified object or its behavior. As such, there is no UAP incident or observation within the document to assess for mundane explanations.
bust_reasoning_zh: 本文件是范登堡空军基地历史办公室的“发射概要”，详细记录了1958年至2000年期间已知的发射行动。这是一份纯粹的行政和历史记录，不包含任何观测现象的叙述、无目击者证词、无传感器数据，亦无任何不明物体及其行为的描述。因此，本文件内不存在可供评估世俗解释的UAP事件或观测记录。

title: State Department UAP Cable 5, Mexico, September 16, 2003
title_zh: 美国国务院UAP电报5号，墨西哥，2003年9月16日
summary: On September 12, 2003, the Mexican Congress heard testimony on Unidentified Aerial Phenomenon (UAP) from experts, including Mexican journalist Jaime Maussan and former U.S. Navy pilot Ryan Graves. The hearing aimed to debate language for an Aerial Space Protection Law, which, if approved, would make Mexico the first country to formally acknowledge the presence of alien life on Earth. Experts urged legislators to recognize UAP, guarantee airspace security, and allow UAP to be studied. They presented alleged alien corpses and videos of Mexican pilots' encounters with fast-moving flying objects. Ryan Graves expressed disappointment with Maussan's "unsubstantiated stunt" regarding the alleged alien corpses, which scientists had previously discredited.
summary_zh: 2003年9月12日，墨西哥国会听取了来自专家，包括墨西哥记者海梅·毛桑和前美国海军飞行员瑞安·格雷夫斯，关于不明空中现象（UAP）的证词。此次听证会旨在讨论一项《空域保护法》的措辞，该法案如获批准，将使墨西哥成为首个正式承认地球上存在外星生命的国家。专家们敦促立法者承认UAP，保障空域安全，并允许对UAP进行研究。他们展示了所谓的外星人尸体以及墨西哥飞行员遭遇快速移动飞行物体的视频。瑞安·格雷夫斯对毛桑关于所谓外星人尸体的“未经证实的花招”表示失望，这些尸体此前已被科学家证伪。
bust_reasoning: The bust score is very high because the document itself contains strong internal evidence discrediting the claims made at the congressional hearing. It explicitly mentions Ryan Graves' disappointment with Jaime Maussan's 'unsubstantiated stunt' and notes that scientists have 'discredited previous alleged alien corpses' presented by Maussan. This directly undermines the credibility of the evidence, including the 'fast-moving flying objects' videos, as presented in that context.
bust_reasoning_zh: 驳斥度极高，因为该文件本身包含强有力的内部证据，驳斥了国会听证会上提出的主张。文件明确提及瑞安·格雷夫斯对海梅·毛桑“未经证实的花招”表示失望，并指出科学家们“已证伪毛桑此前展示的所谓外星人尸体”。这直接削弱了所呈现证据（包括“快速移动飞行物体”视频）在该语境下的可信度。
claims: Mexican Congress heard testimony on UAP Proposed Aerial Space Protection Law could acknowledge alien life Experts requested UAP recognition, airspace security, and study Alleged alien corpses were presented as evidence Videos of fast-moving flying objects encountered by Mexican pilots were presented Disagreement and skepticism regarding the alleged alien corpses
claims_zh: 墨西哥国会听取了关于UAP的证词 拟议的《空域保护法》可能承认外星生命 专家们要求承认UAP、保障空域安全并进行研究 所谓的外星人尸体被作为证据展示 墨西哥飞行员遭遇快速移动飞行物体的视频被展示 对所谓外星人尸体的分歧和怀疑

title: State Department UAP Cable 4, Ashgabat, Turkmenistan, November 5, 2004
title_zh: 美国国务院UAP电报4号，土库曼斯坦阿什哈巴德，2004年11月5日
summary: A diplomatic cable from the U.S. Embassy in Ashgabat, Turkmenistan, discusses the Union of UFOlogists (UOU) of Turkmenabat. Despite its name, the UOU has established itself as a reliable NGO partner for the U.S. government, assisting with small and medium businesses, humanitarian aid, and NGO registration. The cable notes the irony of this partnership, attributing the UOU's success and good rapport with local authorities to the widespread interest in UFOs in Turkmenistan. The UOU's president, Ovezberdy Muradov, has been consulted by Turkmen military and government authorities regarding mysterious occurrences in Turkmen airspace, though he states there have been no confirmed UFO sightings in Turkmenistan. The UOU plans to publish an independent newsletter.
summary_zh: 一份来自美国驻土库曼斯坦阿什哈巴德大使馆的外交电报，讨论了土库曼纳巴德不明飞行物研究者联盟（UOU）。尽管其名称如此，UOU已成为美国政府可靠的非政府组织合作伙伴，协助中小型企业、提供人道主义援助以及非政府组织注册。该电报指出这种伙伴关系的讽刺之处，将UOU的成功及其与地方当局的良好关系归因于土库曼斯坦对不明飞行物的广泛兴趣。UOU主席奥韦兹伯迪·穆拉多夫曾就土库曼斯坦领空发生的神秘事件接受土库曼斯坦军方和政府当局的咨询，尽管他声明土库曼斯坦境内没有确认的不明飞行物目击事件。UOU计划出版一份独立的通讯。
bust_reasoning: The document's title and subject line are misleading. It is not a report of a UAP incident but rather a diplomatic cable detailing the work of a Turkmen NGO whose name includes 'UFOlogists.' The cable explicitly states that the NGO's president confirmed 'no confirmed sightings of UFOs in Turkmenistan,' indicating that the 'UFO' aspect is nominal rather than indicative of an actual anomalous event. Therefore, the document itself provides a mundane explanation for its 'UFO' reference.
bust_reasoning_zh: 该文件的标题和主题行具有误导性。它并非UAP事件报告，而是一份外交电报，详细介绍了土库曼斯坦一个名称中包含“不明飞行物研究者”的非政府组织的工作。该电报明确指出，该非政府组织的主席证实“土库曼斯坦境内没有确认的不明飞行物目击事件”，表明“不明飞行物”方面是名义上的，而非实际异常事件的指示。因此，该文件本身为其“不明飞行物”提及提供了世俗解释。
claims: The Union of UFOlogists (UOU) of Turkmenabat is a reliable NGO partner for the U.S. government in Turkmenistan. The UOU's success stems from its ability to leverage local interest in UFOs to gain rapport with authorities. The UOU provides services such as assisting small and medium businesses, distributing humanitarian aid, and helping other NGOs with registration. UFO President Ovezberdy Muradov has been consulted by Turkmen military and government authorities about mysterious occurrences in Turkmen airspace. No confirmed UFO sightings have occurred in Turkmenistan, according to Muradov. The UOU plans to publish an independent, non-political newsletter.
claims_zh: 土库曼纳巴德不明飞行物研究者联盟（UOU）是美国政府在土库曼斯坦的可靠非政府组织合作伙伴。 UOU的成功源于其利用当地对不明飞行物的兴趣，以与当局建立良好关系的能力。 UOU提供协助中小型企业、分发人道主义援助以及帮助其他非政府组织注册等服务。 不明飞行物研究者联盟主席奥韦兹伯迪·穆拉多夫曾就土库曼斯坦领空发生的神秘事件接受土库曼斯坦军方和政府当局的咨询。 根据穆拉多夫的说法，土库曼斯坦境内没有确认的不明飞行物目击事件。 UOU计划出版一份独立的、非政治性的通讯。

title: DOW-UAP-D55, Mission Report, Syria, November 2016
summary: This document is a mission briefing summarizing an observation of Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena (UAP) by a U.S. military P-8A aircraft near Latakia, Syria. While monitoring KCTG activity in the Eastern Mediterranean, the P-8A observed an unidentified low-flying object via its EO/IR sensor. The object was characterized as appearing to be in 'sea skim mode,' traveling at approximately 500 knots (575 mph) on a southeasterly heading from an unknown origin. The P-8A lost visual contact with the object after approximately two minutes. The mission commander characterized the interaction as safe and assessed it to be standard activity consistent with the assessed activity of the KCTG.
summary_zh: 本文件系一份任务简报，概述了美国军方P-8A飞机在叙利亚拉塔基亚附近对不明异常现象（UAP）的一次观测。在监测东地中海KCTG活动期间，该P-8A飞机通过其EO/IR传感器观测到一个不明低空飞行物体。该物体被描述为处于“掠海模式”，以约500节（575英里/小时）的速度沿东南方向飞行，来源不明。P-8A飞机在大约两分钟后失去了对该物体的目视接触。任务指挥官将此次互动定性为安全，并评估其为与KCTG所评估活动相符的常规活动。
incident_location_zh: 叙利亚拉塔基亚西北55海里
bust_reasoning: The P-8A aircrew observed an object consistent with military activity (500 knots, sea skim mode) in an area where they were monitoring a Russian Carrier Task Group. The mission commander's assessment that it was 'standard activity consistent with the assessed activity of the KCTG' strongly points to a prosaic, albeit unidentified, Russian military craft or weapon system. There are no features that resist this explanation.
bust_reasoning_zh: P-8A机组人员观测到的物体与军事活动（500节，掠海模式）相符，发生在其监测俄罗斯航母战斗群（KCTG）的区域。任务指挥官将其评估为“与KCTG所评估活动相符的常规活动”，强烈指向一个普通的、尽管身份不明的俄罗斯军事飞行器或武器系统。没有特征与此解释相悖。
claims: A U.S. military P-8A aircraft observed an unidentified low-flying object. The object was detected via the aircraft’s EO/IR sensor. The object was characterized as appearing to be in 'sea skim mode'. The object was traveling at approximately 500 knots (575 mph) on a southeasterly heading. The observation lasted approximately two minutes. The object was observed to pass between Russian vessels. The interaction was assessed as safe and consistent with KCTG activity.
claims_zh: 一架美国军方P-8A飞机观测到一个不明低空飞行物体。 该物体通过飞机的EO/IR传感器被探测到。 该物体被描述为似乎处于“掠海模式”。 该物体以约500节（575英里/小时）的速度沿东南方向飞行。 观测持续了大约两分钟。 据观测，该物体从俄罗斯船只之间穿过。 此次互动被评估为安全且与KCTG活动相符。

title: DOW-UAP-D3, Mission Report, Arabian Gulf, 2020
summary: A U.S. military operator reported observing a "line of dots followed by a trailing dot." Four UAP were observed flying in the field of view (FOV) at approximately 1736Z. Cloud coverage obstructed a clear visual. One UAP was observed at 17:36:22, two UAP side by side at 17:36:30, and one UAP at 17:36:49.
summary_zh: 一名美国军事操作员报告称观察到“一串点状物，后随一个拖尾点状物”。大约在1736Z时，在视场（FOV）内观察到四个UAP飞行。云层遮挡了清晰的视线。在17:36:22观察到一个UAP，在17:36:30观察到两个UAP并排飞行，在17:36:49观察到一个UAP。
bust_reasoning: The document explicitly states 'UAP Advanced Capabilities And/Or Materials (yes/no; if yes, describe): NO', which is a strong indicator against an anomalous object. The visual description of '4X UAP OBSERVED FLYING IN FOV' as 'dots' and 'side by side' over a short timeframe is consistent with a satellite train or multiple conventional aircraft, especially given that cloud cover obstructed a clear visual. There is no unredacted information suggesting anomalous kinematics or multi-sensor confirmation that would resist a prosaic explanation.
bust_reasoning_zh: 该文件明确指出“UAP先进能力和/或材料（是/否；如是，请描述）：否”，这强烈表明其并非异常物体。对“在FOV内观察到4个UAP飞行”的视觉描述为“点状物”和“并排”，在短时间内出现，这与卫星列队或多架常规飞机的情况相符，特别是考虑到云层遮挡了清晰的视线。没有未经删节的信息表明存在异常运动学特征或多传感器确认，足以排除普通解释。
claims: U.S. military operator observed a "line of dots followed by a trailing dot" 4 UAP observed flying Cloud coverage obstructed clear visual UAP observed at specific times (17:36:22, 17:36:30, 17:36:49)
claims_zh: 美国军事操作员观察到“一串点状物，后随一个拖尾点状物” 观察到4个UAP飞行 云层遮挡了清晰的视线 UAP在特定时间（17:36:22, 17:36:30, 17:36:49）被观察到

title: DOW-UAP-D38, Range Fouler Debrief, Middle East, May 2020
title_zh: DOW-UAP-D38，靶场干扰物情况汇报，中东，2020年5月
summary: A U.S. military operator performing an ISR tasking observed a solid white, round, opaque object fly through the field-of-view. The object was temporarily lost but re-acquired, and the crew was able to follow it as it made erratic movements above the water, achieving 4x zoom before losing the object due to poor track placement. The sensor operator continuously manipulated the sensor to maintain tracking.
summary_zh: 一名美国军事操作员在执行ISR任务时，观察到一个实心白色、圆形、不透明物体飞过视野。该物体曾短暂丢失但被重新捕获，机组人员能够对其进行跟踪，观察到其在水面上方进行不规则移动，并达到4倍变焦，之后因跟踪定位不佳而丢失该物体。传感器操作员持续操控传感器以保持跟踪。
bust_reasoning: The document describes a multi-sensor (infrared, intermittent radar) and multi-witness observation of a 'solid white, round, opaque object' exhibiting 'erratic movements above the water.' The object was tracked, zoomed on, and required continuous sensor manipulation. The 'erratic movements' are a key feature that resists easy explanation for a simple balloon or debris, pushing the score below 50. However, the description does not indicate behavior incompatible with known craft, placing it in the 15-34 range for genuinely uncertain observations with unusual features.
bust_reasoning_zh: 该文件描述了一项多传感器（红外、间歇性雷达）和多目击者的观察，针对一个表现出“在水面上方进行不规则移动”的“实心白色、圆形、不透明物体”。该物体被跟踪、变焦，并需要持续操控传感器。“不规则移动”是一个关键特征，难以用简单的气球或碎片来解释，因此评分低于50。然而，该描述并未表明其行为与已知飞行器不符，因此将其置于15-34分区间，代表具有异常特征的真正不确定观察。
claims: A solid white, round, opaque object was observed. The object made erratic movements above the water. The object was temporarily lost and re-acquired. The crew achieved 4x zoom on the object. The object was lost due to poor track placement.
claims_zh: 观察到一个实心白色、圆形、不透明物体。 该物体在水面上方进行不规则移动。 该物体曾短暂丢失但被重新捕获。 机组人员对该物体实现了4倍变焦。 该物体因跟踪定位不佳而丢失。

title: DOW-UAP-D65, Mission Report, Persian Gulf, July 2020
summary: A U.S. military operator, flying an aircraft with callsign [1.4a] on an ISR mission supporting NAVCENT, reported three separate observations of Unidentified Aerial Phenomena (UAP) on July 16, 2020, at 1830Z, 1920Z, and 2345Z in the Persian Gulf area. The observations were made using Full Motion Video (FMV). The mission involved conducting scans for identified vessels and UAS activity.
summary_zh: 一名美国军事操作员，驾驶呼号为[1.4a]的飞机执行支援海军中央司令部（NAVCENT）的ISR任务时，于2020年7月16日1830Z、1920Z和2345Z在波斯湾地区报告了三次不明空中现象（UAP）的独立观测。观测通过全动态视频（FMV）进行。该任务涉及对已识别船只和UAS活动进行扫描。
bust_reasoning: The document explicitly labels three distinct observations as 'Unidentified Aerial Phenomenon' by military personnel using advanced FMV sensors. However, the report provides no descriptive details of the UAP's characteristics or anomalous behavior (e.g., kinematics, signature). Crucially, the aircraft's 'Radar Name or Designator' is listed as '-', indicating no radar detection for these events. The mission's objective included scanning for 'UAS activity,' making an unidentified drone a plausible explanation that the document does not rule out.
bust_reasoning_zh: 该文件明确将军事人员使用先进FMV传感器进行的三次独立观测标记为“不明空中现象”。然而，报告未提供UAP特征或异常行为（例如，运动学、信号特征）的描述性细节。至关重要的是，该飞机的“雷达名称或代号”被列为“-”，表明这些事件未被雷达探测到。该任务的目标包括扫描“UAS活动”，这使得不明无人机成为文件未排除的合理解释。
claims: A U.S. military operator observed three separate UAPs Observations occurred at 1830Z, 1920Z, and 2345Z on July 16, 2020 Observations were made via Full Motion Video (FMV)
claims_zh: 一名美国军事操作员观测到三次独立的UAP 观测发生于2020年7月16日1830Z、1920Z和2345Z 观测通过全动态视频（FMV）进行

title: DOW-UAP-D60, Mission Report, Persian Gulf, August 2020
summary: A U.S. military aircraft, callsign [1.4a], conducting ISR operations in the Arabian Gulf, Strait of Hormuz, and Gulf of Oman, observed one UAP at 0726Z. The UAP was described as "transitting" and had "no impact to mission." Dense cloud coverage intermittently impacted Full Motion Video (FMV) collection during the mission, which also involved SIGINT collection.
summary_zh: 一架呼号为[1.4a]的美国军用飞机在阿拉伯湾、霍尔木兹海峡和阿曼湾执行情报、监视、侦察（ISR）行动时，于0726Z观察到一个UAP。该UAP被描述为“正在通过”，且“对任务无影响”。任务期间，浓密的云层间歇性地影响了全动态视频（FMV）的采集，该任务还涉及信号情报（SIGINT）的采集。
bust_reasoning: The bust score is 75 because the document provides very limited information about the UAP itself. It was observed by a single aircraft via FMV, described only as '1X UAP' and 'TRANSITTING'. There is no specific physical description, no kinematic data beyond generic movement, and no explicit confirmation of detection by other available sensors (SIGINT, ANDAS4, AH_GMESH) in relation to the UAP. The lack of any anomalous features or multi-sensor corroboration of specific characteristics means that common prosaic explanations remain highly plausible.
bust_reasoning_zh: 排除可能性评分为75，因为该文件提供了关于UAP本身的非常有限的信息。它由一架飞机通过FMV观察到，仅被描述为“1个UAP”和“正在通过”。没有具体的物理描述，除了通用运动之外没有运动学数据，也没有明确确认其他可用传感器（SIGINT、ANDAS4、AH_GMESH）检测到与UAP相关的信息。缺乏任何异常特征或多传感器对特定特征的证实，意味着常见的平淡解释仍然高度可信。
claims: A UAP was observed by a U.S. military aircraft. The UAP was described as "transitting". The UAP had "no impact to mission". Dense cloud coverage intermittently impacted FMV collection.
claims_zh: 一架美国军用飞机观察到一个UAP。 该UAP被描述为“正在通过”。 该UAP“对任务无影响”。 浓密的云层间歇性地影响了FMV的采集。

title: DOW-UAP-D56, Range Fouler Debrief, Arabian Sea, August 2020
title_zh: DOW-UAP-D56，靶场干扰物情况汇报，阿拉伯海，2020年8月
summary: A U.S. Navy O-3 Pilot from HSM-73 reported observing three unidentified small air contacts during routine operations in the North Arabian Sea on August 24, 2020. The objects, described as 'round' with 'wings/airframe' structure, were initially seen as one contact before two additional contacts appeared. They were moving on a westerly heading and appeared to maintain their relative course, speed, and altitude. No electronic warfare (ES), radar, or IFF tracks were achieved, and no interaction took place.
summary_zh: 2020年8月24日，美国海军HSM-73中队一名O-3级飞行员在北阿拉伯海例行行动中报告观测到三个不明小型空中目标。这些目标被描述为“圆形”且具有“机翼/机身”结构，最初被视为一个目标，随后又出现两个目标。它们以向西航向移动，并且似乎保持了其相对航向、速度和高度。未能获得电子战（ES）、雷达或敌我识别（IFF）跟踪，且未发生任何互动。
bust_reasoning: The bust score of 55 reflects a genuinely uncertain observation. While the single visual sensor and night conditions increase the likelihood of misidentification, the specific description of 'round' with 'wings/airframe' is unusual and not easily reconciled with common mundane objects like simple balloons or lens flares. The lack of radar/IFF is significant but not definitive for anomaly, as small or stealthy objects might evade detection. The behavior described (maintaining relative course, speed, and altitude) is not anomalous, but the sequence of losing one object and then regaining contact with two additional ones adds a layer of ambiguity to the observation's consistency.
bust_reasoning_zh: 55分的“破解”评分反映了这是一次确实不确定的观测。尽管单一视觉传感器和夜间条件增加了误判的可能性，但“圆形”且具有“机翼/机身”结构的具体描述并不寻常，难以与简单的气球或镜头光晕等常见普通物体相符。缺乏雷达/IFF跟踪具有重要意义，但并非异常现象的决定性证据，因为小型或隐形物体可能规避探测。所描述的行为（保持相对航向、速度和高度）并非异常，但先失去一个目标，随后又重新捕捉到两个目标的序列，为观测的一致性增添了一层模糊性。
claims: Three unidentified small air contacts were observed. Objects were described as 'round' with 'wings/airframe' structure. Objects initially appeared on a westerly heading. Objects maintained their relative course, speed, and altitude. No electronic warfare (ES), radar, or IFF track was achieved. The observation was made by a U.S. Navy pilot during routine operations.
claims_zh: 观测到三个不明小型空中目标。 目标被描述为“圆形”且具有“机翼/机身”结构。 目标最初以向西航向出现。 目标保持了其相对航向、速度和高度。 未能获得电子战（ES）、雷达或敌我识别（IFF）跟踪。 该观测由一名美国海军飞行员在例行行动中作出。

title: DOW-UAP-D61, Mission Report, Persian Gulf, August 2020
summary: A U.S. military operator aboard an aircraft observed a formation of unknown flying objects traveling northeast to northwest along the coast for approximately two minutes. The objects were tracked by onboard sensors, but continuous tracking was prevented by light cloud coverage, and aircrew were unable to regain positive identification.
summary_zh: 一名美国军事操作员在机上观察到一组不明飞行物编队，沿海岸线从东北方向向西北方向移动，持续约两分钟。机载传感器对这些物体进行了追踪，但由于轻度云层覆盖，无法持续追踪，机组人员未能重新获得明确识别。
bust_reasoning: The document describes a 'formation of UNK flying objects' tracked for approximately 2 minutes by military aircrew using an unspecified advanced sensor before being lost in cloud cover. The inability of trained personnel with advanced equipment to identify the objects, combined with coherent movement ('traveling NE-NW along the coast') and persistence, resists an easy prosaic explanation. However, the generic description and relatively short observation duration prevent a very low bust score, as mundane explanations like military drones or unusual bird formations remain plausible but unconfirmed by the document itself.
bust_reasoning_zh: 该文件描述了‘一组不明飞行物编队’，由军事机组人员使用未指明的先进传感器追踪了约2分钟，随后在云层中消失。受过训练的人员使用先进设备未能识别这些物体，加上其连贯的移动（‘沿海岸线从东北方向向西北方向移动’）和持续性，难以用简单的世俗解释来解释。然而，其笼统的描述和相对较短的观察持续时间，使得其‘破解’得分并非极低，因为诸如军用无人机或异常鸟群编队等普通解释仍然合理，但未被文件本身证实。
claims: Formation of unknown flying objects observed Objects traveled NE-NW along the coast Observation lasted approximately 2 minutes Tracking lost due to light cloud cover Aircrew unable to regain positive identification
claims_zh: 观察到不明飞行物编队 物体沿海岸线从东北方向向西北方向移动 观察持续约2分钟 因轻度云层覆盖而失去追踪 机组人员未能重新获得明确识别

title: DOW-UAP-D42, Range Fouler Debrief, Japan, 2023
title_zh: DOW-UAP-D42，靶场干扰物情况汇报，日本，2023年
summary: A U.S. military pilot reported observing an initial object flying through a screen, which was then surpassed by a second object of the same size and shape but moving at a much higher speed. During tracking, a total of three UAP were observed simultaneously on the screen, moving amongst each other. This report is a Range Fouler Debrief Form used by the U.S. Navy to record unauthorized intrusions into controlled airspace during military operations.
summary_zh: 一名美国军事飞行员报告称观察到一个初始物体穿过屏幕飞行，随后被第二个物体超越，该物体与第一个物体大小和形状相同，但速度快得多。在跟踪过程中，屏幕上同时观察到总共三个UAP相互移动。本报告为美国海军用于记录军事行动期间对受控空域未经授权入侵的靶场干扰物情况汇报表。
claims: An initial object flew through a screen and was tracked. A second object, of the same size and shape, surpassed the first at a much higher speed. Three objects were observed simultaneously on the screen, moving amongst each other.
claims_zh: 一个初始物体穿过屏幕飞行并被跟踪。 第二个物体，与第一个物体大小和形状相同，以快得多的速度超越了第一个物体。 屏幕上同时观察到三个物体相互移动。

title: DOW-UAP-D57, Range Fouler Reporting Form, Gulf of Aden, September 2020
title_zh: DOW-UAP-D57，靶场干扰物报告表，亚丁湾，2020年9月
summary: A U.S. military operator reported tracking a "round, cold object" over the Gulf of Aden for eight minutes (21:09z to 21:17z on 2020-09-04) at an altitude of 23,819 HAT. The object was tracked via an IR sensor set to "black hot," appearing "bright white." It was traveling 168 degrees at 277 mph and made "a few abrupt directional changes" during the encounter. This report is a standardized Range Fouler Reporting Form used by the U.S. Navy.
summary_zh: 一名美国军事操作员报告称，于2020年9月4日世界时21时09分至21时17分，在亚丁湾上空追踪到一个“圆形、低温物体”，高度为23,819 HAT，持续八分钟。该物体通过设置为“黑热”模式的红外传感器进行追踪，显示为“亮白色”。其以277英里/小时的速度沿168度方向飞行，并在遭遇过程中进行了“几次突然的方向改变”。本报告是美国海军使用的标准化靶场干扰物报告表。
bust_reasoning: The bust score of 45 reflects genuine uncertainty. The object was tracked by a U.S. military operator via an IR sensor for 8 minutes, exhibiting a speed of 277 mph and making 'abrupt directional changes.' The description 'round, cold object' (bright white on black hot IR) combined with these kinematics resists an easy mundane explanation. However, with only a single sensor modality (IR) and no stable trackfile or visual confirmation, a mundane explanation such as a misidentified drone or aircraft with unusual maneuvers and IR signature remains plausible without being definitively ruled out by the document.
bust_reasoning_zh: 驳斥评分为45，反映出真实的不确定性。该物体由一名美国军事操作员通过红外传感器追踪了8分钟，表现出277英里/小时的速度并进行了“突然的方向改变”。“圆形、低温物体”（在黑热红外上显示为亮白色）的描述与这些运动学特征相结合，难以用简单的世俗解释。然而，仅凭单一传感器模式（红外）且没有稳定的追踪文件或视觉确认，诸如被误识别的无人机或具有异常机动和红外特征的飞机等世俗解释仍然合理，且未被文件明确排除。
claims: A "round, cold object" was tracked Object was tracked for 8 minutes Object appeared "bright white" on "black hot" IR sensor Object traveled at 277 mph Object made "abrupt directional changes"
claims_zh: “圆形、低温物体”被追踪 物体被追踪了8分钟 物体在“黑热”红外传感器上显示为“亮白色” 物体以277英里/小时的速度飞行 物体进行了“突然的方向改变”

title: DOW-UAP-D62, Mission Report, Strait of Hormuz, September 2020
title_zh: DOW-UAP-D62，任务报告，霍尔木兹海峡，2020年9月
summary: A U.S. military aircraft (callsign 1.4a) conducting ISR operations in the Strait of Hormuz observed a UAP at 1732Z on September 16, 2020, at an altitude of FL180 (18,000 feet) via FMV. The mission also experienced multiple 'lost link' incidents (EMI) of unknown type, causing flight path deviations and medium mission impact.
summary_zh: 一架美国军用飞机（呼号1.4a）于2020年9月16日1732Z时在霍尔木兹海峡执行ISR行动期间，通过FMV在FL180（18,000英尺）高度观测到一个UAP。该任务还遭遇了多次未知类型的“链路丢失”事件（EMI），导致飞行路径偏离并对任务造成中度影响。
bust_reasoning: The bust score of 75 reflects that the document provides very minimal information about the UAP observation. It is a single observation by a single sensor (FMV) with no description of the object's appearance, kinematics, or any anomalous behavior. The term 'UAP' simply indicates it was unidentified at the time, but the report offers no features that resist a mundane explanation, such as a distant drone or aircraft in a busy operational area, aligning with the 'modest evidence pointing toward a typical prosaic explanation' category.
bust_reasoning_zh: 75分的“揭穿”评分表明，该文件提供的UAP观测信息极少。这是一次由单一传感器（FMV）进行的单次观测，未提供物体外观、运动学特征或任何异常行为的描述。“UAP”一词仅表示当时无法识别该物体，但报告未提供任何特征以排除世俗解释，例如在繁忙作战区域内的远距离无人机或飞机，这与“指向典型世俗解释的适度证据”类别相符。
claims: A UAP was observed by a U.S. military aircraft. The observation occurred at an altitude of FL180 (18,000 feet). The observation was made via FMV. The mission experienced multiple 'lost link' incidents of unknown type.
claims_zh: 一架美国军用飞机观测到一个UAP。 观测发生在FL180（18,000英尺）高度。 观测通过FMV进行。 该任务遭遇了多次未知类型的“链路丢失”事件。

title: DOW-UAP-D63, Mission Report, Strait of Hormuz, October 2020
title_zh: DOW-UAP-D63，任务报告，霍尔木兹海峡，2020年10月
summary: A U.S. military operator reported observing a UAP during an ISR mission supporting NAVCENT in the Strait of Hormuz, Arabian Gulf, and Gulf of Oman. The mission, which spanned from October 1st to October 2nd, 2020, involved characterizing vessels and UAS activity. The UAP was observed at 1829Z on October 2nd, and Full Motion Video (FMV) was exploited.
summary_zh: 一名美国军事操作员报告称，在霍尔木兹海峡、阿拉伯湾和阿曼湾执行支持海军中央司令部（NAVCENT）的情报、监视、侦察（ISR）任务期间，观察到一不明空中现象（UAP）。该任务于2020年10月1日至10月2日期间进行，旨在识别船只和无人机系统（UAS）活动。该UAP于10月2日1829Z时被观察到，并对全动态视频（FMV）进行了分析。
bust_reasoning: The document provides minimal information about the UAP itself, merely stating 'OBSERVED 1X UAP, SEE OBSERVATION LINE 1.' However, 'OBSERVATION LINE 1' is not included in the provided text, leaving no descriptive details about the object's appearance, kinematics, or signature. A significant factor is the explicit mention of '(U) HEAVY HAZE PRECLUDED IMINT ANALYSIS,' which strongly supports the possibility of misidentification or obscured observation. The mission's objective also included characterizing 'UAS ACTIVITY,' making an unidentified drone a plausible explanation. Without any reported anomalous behavior or detailed sensor data, a mundane explanation remains highly probable.
bust_reasoning_zh: 该文件对UAP本身提供的信息极少，仅提及“观察到1个UAP，参见观察线1”。然而，所提供的文本中并未包含“观察线1”，导致缺乏关于该物体外观、运动学特征或信号的描述性细节。一个重要因素是明确提及“(U)浓雾阻碍了图像情报（IMINT）分析”，这有力地支持了误判或视线受阻的可能性。该任务的目标还包括识别“无人机系统（UAS）活动”，这使得不明无人机成为一个合理的解释。在没有任何异常行为报告或详细传感器数据的情况下，一个普通的解释仍然极有可能。
claims: UAP observed by military operator during ISR mission
claims_zh: 军事操作员在ISR任务期间观察到UAP

title: DOW-UAP-D44, Range Fouler Reporting Form, Gulf of Aden, October 2020
title_zh: DOW-UAP-D44，靶场干扰物报告表，亚丁湾，2020年10月
summary: A U.S. military operator reported observing a "round, cold object" via infrared sensor over the Gulf of Aden on October 15, 2020, from 14:18:39Z to 14:19:52Z. The object was tracked traveling at 319 degrees (northwest) at approximately 20 mph and made a few abrupt directional changes during the 1-minute contact. The IR sensor was set to black hot, and the object appeared bright white. The sensor was aimed -50 degrees below the aircraft's altitude, with a slant range of 4.06NM and a ground range of 4.78KM.
summary_zh: 一名美国军事操作员报告称，于2020年10月15日14:18:39Z至14:19:52Z期间，在亚丁湾上空通过红外传感器观察到一个“圆形、低温物体”。该物体被追踪到以约20英里/小时的速度向319度（西北方向）移动，并在约1分钟的接触期间进行了几次突然的方向改变。红外传感器设置为“黑热”模式，该物体呈现亮白色。传感器瞄准低于飞机高度-50度，斜距为4.06海里，地距为4.78公里。
bust_reasoning: The bust score is 45 because the document describes an object with unusual features ('round, cold object' making 'abrupt directional changes' at 20 mph) that resist easy, common prosaic explanations like a simple weather balloon without further details. The 'cold' signature in IR is specific. However, it is a single-sensor (IR) observation with a single witness, and the speed (20 mph) is relatively low, making more advanced kinematic anomalies less likely. A mundane explanation like a small drone or even a large bird remains plausible, but the document does not definitively identify one, placing it in the 'genuinely uncertain' range.
bust_reasoning_zh: 驳斥评分为45分，因为该文件描述了一个具有异常特征的物体（“圆形、低温物体”以20英里/小时的速度进行“突然的方向改变”），这些特征难以用简单的气象气球等常见平实解释来轻易说明，且缺乏进一步细节。红外图像中的“低温”特征是独特的。然而，这是一次单传感器（红外）观测，且只有一名目击者，且速度（20英里/小时）相对较低，使得更高级的运动学异常不太可能发生。小型无人机甚至大型鸟类等普通解释仍属合理，但文件并未明确识别出其中任何一种，因此将其归类为“真正不确定”范围。
claims: A round, cold object was observed via infrared sensor. The object traveled at 319 degrees at 20 mph. The object made abrupt directional changes. The observation lasted approximately 1 minute.
claims_zh: 通过红外传感器观察到一个圆形、低温物体。 该物体以20英里/小时的速度向319度方向移动。 该物体进行了突然的方向改变。 观测持续了约1分钟。

title: DOW-UAP-D58, Range Fouler Debrief, NA, October 2020
title_zh: DOW-UAP-D58，靶场干扰物情况汇报，NA，2020年10月
summary: A U.S. military operator reported an encounter with a group of two UAP during a DCA mission at night. The operator obtained radar lock and target pod video, showing two IR significant contacts. The UAP were described as "balloon-shaped," metallic, and reflective, characterized by "2x red blinking strobes." One UAP was observed circling the other. The objects disappeared in 1/30th of a second, and noise jamming was received, indicated by two chevrons.
summary_zh: 一名美国军事操作员报告，在夜间执行DCA任务期间遭遇两架UAP。该操作员获取了雷达锁定和目标吊舱视频，显示两个红外特征显著的目标。这些UAP被描述为“气球状”、金属质地且具有反射性，特征为“2个红色闪烁频闪灯”。观察到其中一个UAP围绕另一个UAP盘旋。这些物体在1/30秒内消失，并接收到噪声干扰，由两个V形符号指示。
bust_reasoning: The bust score is low due to multiple highly anomalous features reported across multiple sensor modalities. The object was detected by radar, target pod video (IR), visual observation ('Tally Achieved' with '2x red blinking strobes'), and electronic warfare indications ('noise jamming'). The most significant feature resisting mundane explanation is the reported kinematics: the objects 'disappeared in 1/30th of a second,' which is a sub-second disappearance incompatible with known conventional craft. Additionally, the objects exhibited controlled behavior ('one range fouler was circling around the other') and emitted active electronic signals ('noise jamming'). While described as 'balloon-shaped,' this single descriptive element is heavily contradicted by the observed behavior and multi-sensor data, pushing the score into the 'behavior incompatible with known craft' category.
bust_reasoning_zh: 排除得分较低，因为通过多种传感器模式报告了多项高度异常的特征。该物体通过雷达、目标吊舱视频 (IR)、目视观察（“已确认目标”并带有“2个红色闪烁频闪灯”）以及电子战迹象（“噪声干扰”）被探测到。最显著的、难以用常规解释的特征是报告的运动学：物体“在1/30秒内消失”，这种亚秒级消失与已知常规飞行器不符。此外，这些物体表现出受控行为（“一个靶场干扰物围绕另一个盘旋”）并发出主动电子信号（“噪声干扰”）。尽管被描述为“气球状”，但这一单一描述元素与观察到的行为和多传感器数据严重矛盾，使得该事件被归入“行为与已知飞行器不符”的类别。
claims: Two UAP contacts detected UAP described as balloon-shaped, metallic, and reflective UAP characterized by 2x red blinking strobes One UAP observed circling the other Radar lock and target pod video obtained UAP disappeared in 1/30th of a second Noise jamming received
claims_zh: 探测到两架UAP目标 UAP被描述为气球状、金属质地且具有反射性 UAP特征为2个红色闪烁频闪灯 观察到其中一个UAP围绕另一个盘旋 获取了雷达锁定和目标吊舱视频 UAP在1/30秒内消失 接收到噪声干扰

title: DOW-UAP-D64, Mission Report, Iran, November 2020
summary: A U.S. military operator on an ISR mission for NAVCENT reported observing two Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena (UAP) on November 2, 2020, at 2143Z and 2148Z. The first UAP was observed at an unknown altitude with a bearing of 080 T. The second UAP was observed traveling northwest. The observations occurred during an ISR mission in the Arabian Gulf, Strait of Hormuz, and Gulf of Oman. The method of observation was Full Motion Video (FMV). The mission also involved a guardcall from Iranian Air Defense which had no impact on the mission.
summary_zh: 一名为美国海军中央司令部（NAVCENT）执行情报、监视、侦察（ISR）任务的美国军事操作员报告称，于2020年11月2日21时43分（协调世界时）和21时48分（协调世界时）观测到两个不明异常现象（UAP）。第一个UAP在未知高度被观测到，方位角为080真北。第二个UAP被观测到向西北方向移动。这些观测发生于在阿拉伯湾、霍尔木兹海峡和阿曼湾区域执行ISR任务期间。观测方法为全动态视频（FMV）。该任务还涉及伊朗防空部队发出的警戒呼叫，但对任务无影响。
bust_reasoning: The bust score is 30 because the document reports two UAPs observed by a U.S. military aircraft using multiple sensors (FMV, ANDAS4, AH\GMESH). The mission's specific objective included identifying 'UAS activity', yet the objects remained 'UNIDENTIFIED AERIAL PHENOMENON'. This lack of identification by trained operators, despite the mission context and available sensors, suggests the objects exhibited features that resisted easy prosaic explanation within the document itself, placing it below the neutral 50 score.
bust_reasoning_zh: 揭穿评分为30，因为该文件报告称，一架美国军用飞机使用多种传感器（FMV、ANDAS4、AH\GMESH）观测到两个UAP。该任务的特定目标包括识别“无人机系统（UAS）活动”，然而这些物体仍被列为“不明空中现象”。尽管有任务背景和可用传感器，但受过训练的操作员未能识别这些物体，这表明这些物体表现出难以在该文件本身中轻易给出平实解释的特征，因此其评分低于中性值50。
claims: Two UAP observations on November 2, 2020 First UAP observed at unknown altitude with a bearing of 080 T Second UAP observed traveling northwest Observation method was Full Motion Video (FMV) Iranian Air Defense issued a guardcall with no mission impact
claims_zh: 2020年11月2日观测到两个UAP 第一个UAP在未知高度被观测到，方位角为080真北 第二个UAP被观测到向西北方向移动 观测方法为全动态视频（FMV） 伊朗防空部队发出警戒呼叫，但对任务无影响

title: DOW-UAP-PR20, Unresolved UAP Report, Kuwait, May 2022
title_zh: DOW-UAP-PR20，未解决的UAP报告，科威特，2022年5月
summary: A UAP report submitted by USCENTCOM to AARO in 2022, including a digitally altered still image from a U.S. military system. The UAP was described as a small, bright, elongated object moving from north to northeast, which the operator was unable to positively identify.
summary_zh: 美国中央司令部于2022年向全域异常解决办公室（AARO）提交了一份UAP报告，其中包含一张来自美国军事系统的经过数字修改的静态图像。该UAP被描述为一个小型、明亮、细长的物体，从北部向东北方向移动，操作员未能明确识别该物体。
bust_reasoning: The bust score of 60 reflects that while the report is labeled 'Unresolved UAP Report' by a military agency, the available data is limited to a single, grainy optical sensor feed showing a 'small, bright, elongated object' with simple linear movement. This places it in the 'genuinely uncertain' category where mundane explanations remain plausible without being explicitly ruled out by the document itself, but the 'unresolved' status prevents a higher bust score.
bust_reasoning_zh: 驳斥评分为60分，表明尽管该报告被军事机构标记为“未解决的UAP报告”，但可用数据仅限于一份单一、颗粒状的光学传感器影像，显示一个“小型、明亮、细长的物体”具有简单的线性移动。这将其归入“确实不确定”的类别，在此类别中，世俗解释仍然合理，且未被文件本身明确排除，但“未解决”的状态阻止了更高的驳斥评分。
claims: UAP reported by USCENTCOM to AARO Still image from U.S. military system Image digitally altered with a red line Object described as small, bright, elongated Object moved from north to northeast Object remained unidentified
claims_zh: 美国中央司令部向全域异常解决办公室（AARO）报告的UAP 来自美国军事系统的静态图像 图像经数字修改并带有红线 物体被描述为小型、明亮、细长 物体从北部向东北方向移动 物体仍未识别

title: DOW-UAP-D10, Mission Report, Middle East, May 2022
summary: A U.S. military operator, during an ISR mission in Iraq, observed five Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena (UAP) via Full Motion Video (FMV) sensors. One UAP was described as having the visual reconnaissance profile of a possible missile, while the remaining four UAPs fit the profile of possible birds. Dust hindered ground collection during the mission.
summary_zh: 一名美国军事操作员在伊拉克执行ISR任务期间，通过FMV传感器观察到五个不明异常现象 (UAP)。其中一个UAP被描述为具有“可能导弹”的视觉侦察特征，而其余四个UAP符合“可能鸟类”的特征。任务期间，沙尘阻碍了地面信息收集。
bust_reasoning: The bust score is high because the document itself provides mundane explanations for the majority of the observed UAPs. Four out of five UAPs are explicitly described as 'possible birds', and the fifth as a 'possible missile'. The mention of 'dust hindered' FMV collection further supports the likelihood of misidentification due to environmental factors.
bust_reasoning_zh: 驳斥得分较高，因为文件本身对大多数观察到的UAP提供了世俗解释。五个UAP中有四个被明确描述为“可能鸟类”，第五个被描述为“可能导弹”。文件中提及“沙尘阻碍”FMV收集，进一步支持了因环境因素导致误判的可能性。
claims: Observation of 5 UAPs One UAP had the visual profile of a possible missile Four UAPs had the visual profile of possible birds
claims_zh: 观察到5个UAP 一个UAP具有“可能导弹”的视觉特征 四个UAP具有“可能鸟类”的视觉特征

title: DOW-UAP-D12, Mission Report, Iraq, May 2022
summary: A U.S. military operator reported observing one UAP flying north to northeast over Iraq on May 20, 2022. The observer followed the UAP for as long as possible but was unable to positively identify it. The mission involved SIGINT and FMV collection.
summary_zh: 一名美国军事操作员报告称，于2022年5月20日在伊拉克上空观察到一个UAP向北至东北方向飞行。观察员尽可能长时间地追踪该UAP，但未能明确识别其身份。该任务涉及信号情报（SIGINT）和全动态视频（FMV）收集。
bust_reasoning: The bust score is 60 because the document explicitly states the object was a 'UAP' and the 'Screener could not get a positive ID.' This indicates genuine uncertainty, placing it in the 35-64 range. However, no anomalous kinematics or specific sensor signatures are described (fields are blank), and the behavior ('fly north to north east and followed as long as possible') is consistent with mundane objects, preventing a lower score.
bust_reasoning_zh: 排除得分评定为60分，因为文件明确指出该物体为“UAP”，且“筛选员未能获得明确识别”。这表明存在真实的未确定性，将其置于35-64分的范围内。然而，未描述异常运动学特征或特定传感器信号（相关字段为空白），且其行为（“向北至东北方向飞行并尽可能长时间地追踪”）与普通物体一致，从而阻止了更低得分的评定。
claims: A UAP was observed flying north to northeast. The UAP could not be positively identified.
claims_zh: 观察到一个UAP向北至东北方向飞行。 该UAP未能明确识别其身份。

title: DOW-UAP-D14, Mission Report, Iraq, May 2022
summary: A U.S. military operator on an ISR mission reported observing one possible small UAP flying north to northeast. The observer followed the UAP for as long as possible but was unable to positively identify it.
summary_zh: 一名美国军事操作员在一次情报、监视与侦察（ISR）任务中，报告观察到一个可能的小型UAP向北偏东北方向飞行。观察员尽可能长时间地跟踪该UAP，但未能对其进行明确识别。
bust_reasoning: The document describes a 'possible small UAP' that was 'observed' and 'followed as long as possible' by a screener who 'could not get a positive ID.' While the inability to positively identify the object despite persistent tracking suggests it wasn't immediately obvious, the report provides no detailed physical description or anomalous kinematic behavior. This places the event in the 'genuinely uncertain' category, where mundane explanations remain plausible without being explicitly ruled out by the document.
bust_reasoning_zh: 该文件描述了一个由一名筛查员“观察”并“尽可能长时间地跟踪”但“未能获得明确识别”的“可能的小型UAP”。尽管持续跟踪仍未能明确识别该物体，这表明其并非一目了然，但报告未提供详细的物理描述或异常的运动行为。这使得该事件属于“真正不确定”类别，即在文件未明确排除的情况下，普通解释仍具有合理性。
claims: A U.S. military aircraft observed a UAP The UAP was described as 'possible small' The UAP was flying north to northeast The UAP could not be positively identified
claims_zh: 一架美国军用飞机观察到一个UAP 该UAP被描述为“可能的小型” 该UAP向北偏东北方向飞行 该UAP未能被明确识别

title: DOW-UAP-D16, Mission Report, Syria, July 2022
summary: A Mission Report (MISREP) from the Department of War detailing a UAP observation by a U.S. military operator in Syria on July 31, 2022, during Operation INHERENT RESOLVE. The UAP was observed moving from north to south for less than one minute. The mission involved IMINT and SIGINT collection, and full motion video was exploited.
summary_zh: 一份来自美国战争部的任务报告 (MISREP)，详细说明了2022年7月31日在美国“固有决心行动”期间，一名美国军事操作员在叙利亚观测到一起UAP事件。该UAP被观测到从北向南移动，持续时间不足一分钟。该任务涉及图像情报 (IMINT) 和信号情报 (SIGINT) 收集，并对全动态视频进行了利用。
bust_reasoning: The document describes a single, brief UAP observation ('less than a minute') with no physical description of the object and only simple linear movement ('moving from N to S'). There is no mention of unusual kinematics, signatures, or effects on the observing platform, nor any corroborating sensors or witnesses. The extreme lack of detail and brevity of the event description places it firmly in the 'single low-quality grainy image with no kinematics and no corroborating witnesses' category, making a mundane explanation highly probable.
bust_reasoning_zh: 该文件描述了一次单一且短暂的UAP观测（“不足一分钟”），未提供该物体的物理描述，且仅有简单的线性移动（“从北向南移动”）。未提及异常运动学、特征或对观测平台的影响，亦无任何佐证传感器或目击者。事件描述的极度缺乏细节和简短性，使其明确归入“单一低质量模糊图像，无运动学数据，无佐证目击者”的类别，使得世俗解释的可能性极高。
claims: A UAP was observed by a U.S. military operator The UAP moved from north to south The observation lasted less than one minute
claims_zh: 一名美国军事操作员观测到一起UAP 该UAP从北向南移动 观测持续时间不足一分钟

title: DOW-UAP-D18, Mission Report, Iraq, December 2022
summary: A Mission Report (MISREP) from the U.S. military detailing an operation in Iraq on December 1, 2022. During an ISR mission, a U.S. military operator observed one "possible UAP/UAV" flying from west to east at 1620Z. The observer did not pursue the object and continued the assigned mission. The report notes that descriptive language reflects subjective interpretation and should not be taken as conclusive.
summary_zh: 一份来自美国军方的任务报告（MISREP），详细说明了2022年12月1日在伊拉克进行的一次行动。在一次ISR任务期间，一名美国军事操作员观察到一个“可能的UAP/UAV”于1620Z从西向东飞行。观察员未对该物体进行追踪，并继续执行既定任务。报告指出，描述性语言反映了主观判断，不应被视为结论性证据。
bust_reasoning: The bust score is high because the document itself suggests a prosaic explanation by labeling the object 'POSSIBLE UAP/UAV'. Crucially, the report explicitly states 'UAP Signatures: No' and provides no unusual kinematics, physical descriptions, or multi-sensor convergence for the UAP. The friendly aircraft 'DID NOT FOLLOW UAP' and 'CONTINUED THE MISSION AS TASKED', indicating it was not considered a significant anomaly by the operators.
bust_reasoning_zh: 该事件的破解可能性较高，因为文件本身通过将该物体标记为“可能的UAP/UAV”而暗示了世俗解释。至关重要的是，报告明确指出“UAP特征：无”，并且未提供UAP的异常运动学、物理描述或多传感器融合信息。友机“未追踪UAP”并“继续执行既定任务”，表明操作员未将其视为重大异常现象。
claims: A U.S. military operator observed one "possible UAP/UAV" The object was flying from west to east The observation occurred at 1620Z on December 1, 2022 The observer did not pursue the UAP The observation happened during an ISR mission in Iraq
claims_zh: 一名美国军事操作员观察到一个“可能的UAP/UAV” 该物体从西向东飞行 观察发生于2022年12月1日1620Z 观察员未追踪该UAP 该观察发生于伊拉克的一次ISR任务期间

title: Western US Event
summary: This document summarizes statements from seven federal law enforcement special agents who reported observing four distinct categories of unidentified anomalous phenomena over two days in the Western United States in 2023. Observations included orange orbs launching smaller red orbs, a large stationary glowing orange orb (12-18 meters) near a rock pinnacle, a 'dark kite' shaped object with red and white lights moving laterally at 15-20mph with zero resistance, and a 'transparent kite' shaped object floating slowly and appearing to block a spotlight beam. The report notes the events' compelling nature due to witness credibility and shared features with other AARO reports, despite lacking direct technical data.
summary_zh: 本文件概述了七名联邦执法特工的陈述，他们报告称于2023年在美国西部为期两天的时间内观察到四类不同的不明异常现象。观察到的现象包括橙色球体发射较小的红色球体；一个大型静止发光的橙色球体（12-18米），位于一处岩石尖峰附近；一个带有红白灯光的“深色风筝”状物体，以15-20英里/小时的速度横向移动，且无阻力；以及一个“透明风筝”状物体缓慢漂浮并似乎阻挡了探照灯光束。报告指出，尽管缺乏直接技术数据，但由于目击者的可信度以及与其他AARO报告的共同特征，这些事件具有引人注目的性质。
bust_reasoning: The document describes multiple distinct events observed by multiple federal law enforcement agents (USPER1-7) using bare eye, night vision goggles, and interacting with a spotlight. Key features like 'orbs launching orbs' with rapid disappearance, a 12-18 meter silent hovering orb, 'zero resistance' movement of a 'kite-shaped' object, its transparency, and the documented blockage of a spotlight beam, collectively resist easy mundane explanation. The convergence of multiple witnesses and sensor modalities on these highly unusual behaviors places the bust score low, indicating a genuinely anomalous observation not easily dismissed by prosaic explanations within the document itself.
bust_reasoning_zh: 该文件描述了多名联邦执法特工（USPER1-7）通过肉眼、夜视镜以及与探照灯互动观察到的多个不同事件。“球体发射球体”并迅速消失、一个12-18米无声悬停的球体、“风筝状”物体无阻力移动、其透明性以及探照灯光束被阻挡的记录等关键特征，共同抵制了简单的世俗解释。多名目击者和多种传感器模式对这些高度异常行为的共同观察，使得“揭穿”得分较低，表明这是一次真正的异常观察，不易被文件本身的平淡解释所驳斥。
claims: Orange orbs launched smaller red orbs, then disappeared. Large, glowing orange orb (12-18 meters) observed stationary near a rock pinnacle with no sound. Object described as a 'dark kite' or 'triangular' with red and white lights moved laterally at 15-20mph with zero resistance. Transparent, kite-shaped object floated slowly, appeared to block a spotlight beam.
claims_zh: 橙色球体发射了较小的红色球体，随后消失。 一个大型发光的橙色球体（12-18米）被观察到无声地静止在一处岩石尖峰附近。 一个被描述为“深色风筝”或“三角形”的物体，带有红白灯光，以15-20英里/小时的速度横向移动，且无阻力。 透明的风筝状物体缓慢漂浮，似乎阻挡了探照灯光束。

title: DOW-UAP-D19, Mission Report, Syria, February 21, 2023
title_zh: DOW-UAP-D19，任务报告，叙利亚，2023年2月21日
summary: This document is a Mission Report (MISREP) detailing a U.S. military F-15E flight conducting a DCA mission in Syria. During the mission, a U.S. military operator reported observing three possible UAP at FL240, with two described as white objects showing significant IR signatures, and later one possible balloon at FL210. The mission also experienced MFT radar jamming near Shaddadi.
summary_zh: 本文件为一份任务报告（MISREP），详细说明了美国军方F-15E战斗机在叙利亚执行防空作战（DCA）任务的一次飞行。任务期间，一名美国军事操作员报告观察到三个可能的UAP，高度为FL240，其中两个被描述为白色物体，显示出显著的红外（IR）特征。随后又观察到一个可能的气球，高度为FL210。该任务还在沙达迪（Shaddadi）附近遭遇MFT雷达干扰。
bust_reasoning: The bust score of 45 reflects genuine uncertainty. The document describes '3X POSS UAP' observed visually and as '2 white objects IR significant' at FL240, but explicitly states 'NO RADAR RETURNS RECEIVED FROM UAP.' This multi-sensor observation (visual + IR) combined with the *absence* of radar detection for physical objects at that altitude is an unusual feature that resists easy explanation. However, no anomalous kinematics (e.g., impossible maneuvers) are reported, and plausible mundane explanations like a low-radar-cross-section balloon or stealthy drone cannot be ruled out by the document's narrative alone. The separate observation of a 'POSS BALLOON' later in the mission suggests the aircrew distinguished between the two types of sightings.
bust_reasoning_zh: 45分的“破解”评分反映了真实的不确定性。该文件描述了在FL240高度目视观察到的“3个可能的UAP”，其中“2个白色物体具有显著红外（IR）特征”，但明确指出“未从UAP接收到雷达回波”。这种多传感器观测（目视+红外）与在该高度对物理物体缺乏雷达探测相结合，是一个难以轻易解释的异常特征。然而，报告中未提及异常运动学特征（例如，不可能的机动），仅凭文件叙述，无法排除低雷达截面气球或隐形无人机等看似合理的普通解释。任务后期单独观察到“一个可能的气球”，表明机组人员区分了这两种目击事件。
claims: Three possible UAP observed visually at FL240. No radar returns received from the observed UAP. Two of the UAP showed significant IR signatures. One possible balloon observed visually at FL210. MFT radar jamming experienced at FL270.
claims_zh: 在FL240高度目视观察到三个可能的UAP。 未从观察到的UAP接收到雷达回波。 其中两个UAP显示出显著的红外（IR）特征。 在FL210高度目视观察到一个可能的气球。 在FL270高度遭遇MFT雷达干扰。

title: DOW-UAP-D51, Email Correspondence, Pacific Time Zone, March 2023
title_zh: DOW-UAP-D51，电子邮件通信，太平洋时区，2023年3月
summary: Email correspondence describing a mission report detailing a civilian's observation of a large, blue, featureless, triangular object. The object emitted 'whitish blue' light, hovered stationary near a national security facility for three minutes, then moved higher with 'jerking' or 'jumping' motion, observed for eight minutes. The motion was inconsistent with jet propulsion.
summary_zh: 电子邮件通信，描述了一份任务报告，详细说明了一名平民观察到一个大型、蓝色、无特征的三角形物体。该物体发出“泛白蓝色”光，在一个国家安全设施附近静止悬停三分钟，随后以“抽搐”或“跳跃”的动作向上移动，观察时长八分钟。该运动与喷气推进不符。
bust_reasoning: The bust score is 60 because the report relies on a single visual witness and lacks corroborating sensor data, which generally points to a higher bust score. However, the specific description of a 'large blue featureless triangular object with a solid, unwavering silhouette' emitting 'powerful whitish blue light' and exhibiting 'jerking' or 'jumping' motion inconsistent with 'smooth jet propulsion' presents unusual features that resist easy, immediate prosaic explanation, placing it in the 'genuinely uncertain' range rather than 'modest evidence pointing toward a typical prosaic explanation'.
bust_reasoning_zh: 驳斥评分为60，因为该报告仅依赖单一目击证人，且缺乏佐证的传感器数据，这通常会导致较高的驳斥评分。然而，对一个“大型、蓝色、无特征的三角形物体，具有坚实、稳定的轮廓”，发出“强大的泛白蓝色光”，并表现出与“平稳喷气推进”不符的“抽搐”或“跳跃”运动的详细描述，呈现出不寻常的特征，难以轻易、即时地进行平实解释，这使其处于“真正不确定”的范围，而非“指向典型平实解释的适度证据”。
claims: An individual reported observing a large blue featureless triangular object. Object emitted powerful 'whitish blue' light from multiple points along its perimeter. Object hovered stationary above or near a national security facility for approximately three minutes. Object moved to a position higher in the field of view. Object's motion was characterized as 'backing up' in a 'jerking' or 'jumping' manner. Motion was inconsistent with 'smooth' jet propulsion. Object was observed for approximately eight minutes. Reporter could not discern whether or how the object was controlled. Reporter could not identify its means of propulsion. Reporter could not determine whether it had a defined 'front or rear'. Reporter 'didn't think' the object was a drone. Object did not seem to travel along a defined flight path. Object did not possess any 'photograph or data collection capabilities'. Object did not emit a 'vapor trail'. Object did not demonstrate 'cloaking capabilities'.
claims_zh: 一名个人报告观察到一个大型、蓝色、无特征的三角形物体。 物体从其周边的多个点发出强大的“泛白蓝色”光。 物体在一个国家安全设施上方或附近静止悬停约三分钟。 物体移动到视野中更高位置。 物体的运动特征为“后退”，以“抽搐”或“跳跃”的方式。 运动与“平稳”的喷气推进不符。 物体被观察到约八分钟。 报告者无法辨别该物体是否受控或如何受控。 报告者无法识别其推进方式。 报告者无法确定其是否有明确的“前方或后方”。 报告者“不认为”该物体是无人机。 物体似乎没有沿着明确的飞行路径移动。 物体不具备任何“摄影或数据收集能力”。 物体没有发出“凝结尾迹”。 物体没有展示“隐形能力”。

title: DOW-UAP-D20, Mission Report, Southern United States, 2020
summary: A U.S. F-16CM flight operating in Iraqi/Syrian airspace during Operation Inherent Resolve observed several bright objects maneuvering quickly. The objects were tracked for approximately 20 seconds via an onboard targeting pod before dimming and disappearing. An analyst noted that targeting pod results for the UAP differed from those for a star.
summary_zh: 在“坚定决心行动”期间，一架美国F-16CM战机编队在伊拉克/叙利亚领空执行任务时，观察到数个快速机动的明亮物体。这些物体被机载瞄准吊舱追踪约20秒，随后变暗并消失。一名分析员指出，瞄准吊舱对UAP的追踪结果与对恒星的追踪结果不同。
bust_reasoning: The report describes 10-20 bright objects at FL600+ observed visually and on a targeting pod by F-16CM pilots, maneuvering quickly west to east before dimming and disappearing. The analyst explicitly noted the targeting pod signature was different from stars. While the multi-sensor and multi-witness aspects are present, and the 'maneuvering quickly' is unusual, the document lacks specific kinematic data (e.g., precise speed, G-forces) that would definitively rule out high-altitude space debris, balloons, or unusual atmospheric phenomena. The 'dimmed and disappeared' behavior could also be prosaic, keeping a mundane explanation plausible but not easily identifiable.
bust_reasoning_zh: 报告描述，F-16CM飞行员目视并使用瞄准吊舱观察到10至20个位于FL600+高度的明亮物体，这些物体快速地从西向东机动，随后变暗并消失。分析员明确指出，瞄准吊舱的特征与恒星不同。尽管存在多传感器和多目击者的情况，且“快速机动”行为异常，但该文件缺乏具体的运动学数据（例如，精确速度、G力），无法明确排除高空空间碎片、气球或异常大气现象的可能性。“变暗并消失”的行为也可能平淡无奇，使得世俗解释具有合理性但不易识别。
claims: F-16CM flight observed multiple possible UAPs Several bright objects were seen maneuvering quickly west to east northeast Objects were tracked on a targeting pod (TV mode) for approximately 20 seconds Objects dimmed and disappeared from the targeting pod Objects were not seen in formations, unlike prior sorties Targeting pod results for UAP differed from those for a star
claims_zh: F-16CM战机编队观察到多个可能的UAP 观察到数个明亮物体快速地从西向东北方向机动 物体被瞄准吊舱（电视模式）追踪约20秒 物体从瞄准吊舱中变暗并消失 物体未呈编队飞行，这与之前的出动情况不同 瞄准吊舱对UAP的追踪结果与对恒星的追踪结果不同

title: FBI September 2023 Sighting - Composite Sketch
title_zh: 联邦调查局2023年9月目击事件——模拟画像
summary: A composite sketch, based on corroborating eyewitness reports from September 2023, depicts an apparent ellipsoid bronze metallic object, 130-195 feet in length, that materialized from a bright light in the sky and disappeared instantaneously. This graphic overlay was rendered by the FBI Lab on an actual site photo.
summary_zh: 一份基于2023年9月多名目击者证词的模拟画像，描绘了一个疑似椭圆形青铜色金属物体，长度为130至195英尺，该物体从空中一道亮光中显现并瞬间消失。此图形叠加由联邦调查局实验室在实际现场照片上制作。
bust_reasoning: The bust score of 40 reflects that the described behavior ('materializing out of a bright light in the sky and disappearing instantaneously') and object size (130-195 feet) are highly unusual and resist easy mundane explanation. However, the evidence is limited to a composite sketch based on eyewitness accounts, lacking multi-sensor or multi-witness convergence beyond the initial visual observation, which prevents a lower score. A mundane explanation, while challenging, cannot be definitively ruled out by the document itself.
bust_reasoning_zh: 驳斥评分为40分，反映出所描述的行为（“从空中一道亮光中显现并瞬间消失”）和物体尺寸（130-195英尺）极不寻常，难以用普通解释来阐明。然而，证据仅限于基于目击者证词的模拟画像，缺乏除初步视觉观察之外的多传感器或多目击者交叉验证，这使得评分无法降低。尽管存在挑战，但文件本身无法完全排除普通解释的可能性。
claims: An ellipsoid bronze metallic object was sighted. The object was 130-195 feet in length. The object materialized from a bright light in the sky. The object disappeared instantaneously. The sighting occurred in September 2023. The report is based on corroborating eyewitness accounts. An FBI Lab rendered graphic overlay (composite sketch) was created.
claims_zh: 目击到一个椭圆形青铜色金属物体。 该物体长度为130至195英尺。 该物体从空中一道亮光中显现。 该物体瞬间消失。 目击事件发生于2023年9月。 该报告基于多名目击者的证词。 联邦调查局实验室制作了一份图形叠加（模拟画像）。

title: FBI September 2023 Sighting - Serial 3
title_zh: 联邦调查局2023年9月目击事件 - 序列3
summary: An FBI 302 interview with a US citizen regarding a first-hand account of a UAP encounter at a US test site. The witness observed a bright light, described as "metallic bronze in color" (per official blurb), that was initially stationary, then moved right, and disappeared. The witness thought it might have been a meteor.
summary_zh: 联邦调查局对一名美国公民进行302号访谈，内容涉及其在美国某试验场亲身遭遇UAP的报告。目击者观察到一个亮光，据官方描述为“金属青铜色”，该物体最初静止，随后向右移动并消失。目击者推测其可能为一颗流星。
bust_reasoning: The bust score is 75 because the document itself contains a plausible mundane explanation offered by a witness (meteor). The observation was visual only, lasted a short duration (10 seconds), and described simple kinematics (stationary, then moved right, then disappeared). While multiple witnesses were present, the corroboration was not strong, with one witness looking in the wrong direction and another being 'indifferent' until others confirmed seeing it. These factors collectively point towards a prosaic explanation being highly likely.
bust_reasoning_zh: 破解评分为75，原因在于该文件本身包含目击者提出的一个合理世俗解释（流星）。此次观察仅为视觉观察，持续时间短（10秒），且描述了简单的运动学特征（静止，随后向右移动，然后消失）。尽管有多名目击者在场，但相互印证不力，其中一名目击者看向错误方向，另一名目击者在他人确认看到之前表现“漠然”。这些因素共同表明，存在世俗解释的可能性极高。
claims: Witness observed a bright light Object was stationary, then moved right, then disappeared Object was visible for approximately ten seconds Witness considered the possibility it was a meteor
claims_zh: 目击者观察到亮光 物体最初静止，随后向右移动并消失 物体可见时长约十秒 目击者考虑其可能为流星

title: FBI September 2023 Sighting - Serial 4
title_zh: 联邦调查局2023年9月目击事件 - 编号4
summary: This is an FBI 302 interview conducted with a US citizen regarding their first-hand account of a UAP encounter at a US test site. The witness, a USPER, described a cigar-shaped object that was metallic bronze in color with an intense diamond white light. The object was observed hovering and slowly moving from east to west before it disappeared. The witness also reported a gate malfunction just prior to the sighting. Another contractor also witnessed the object.
summary_zh: 这是一份联邦调查局对一名美国公民进行的302号访谈记录，内容涉及其在美国某试验场亲身经历的UAP（不明空中现象）遭遇。该证人（一名美国人员）描述了一个雪茄形物体，呈金属青铜色，并发出强烈钻石白色光。该物体被观察到悬停并缓慢地从东向西移动，随后消失。证人还报告称，在目击事件发生前，一扇大门出现故障。另一名承包商也目击了该物体。
