bust_reasoning: The bust score is 45 because the sighting involves two witnesses and describes an object with several unusual features that resist easy prosaic explanation: its very large size (2-3 Blackhawks long), complete silence at a relatively low altitude (500-3000 ft above tree line), and rapid disappearance within 5-10 seconds. The primary witness's 15 years of experience with military aircraft and drones, and her statement of never seeing anything like it, adds weight. However, it is a visual-only sighting, and the reported kinematics (hovering, slow movement) are not extreme, preventing a lower score.
bust_reasoning_zh: 排除分数为45分，因为此次目击事件涉及两名证人，并描述了一个具有数个异常特征的物体，这些特征难以用普通解释来澄清：其尺寸非常巨大（长达2-3架“黑鹰”直升机），在相对较低的高度（树线以上500-3000英尺）完全无声，以及在5-10秒内迅速消失。主要证人拥有15年军用飞机和无人机经验，且其声明从未见过类似物体，这增加了可信度。然而，这仅为视觉目击，且所报告的运动学特征（悬停、缓慢移动）并非极端，从而未能获得更低的分数。
claims: Witness observed a cigar-shaped object with an intense diamond white light. Object was metallic bronze in color and silent. Object was hovering and slowly moving, then disappeared. A gate malfunctioned prior to the sighting. Another witness also saw the object.
claims_zh: 证人观察到一个雪茄形物体，发出强烈钻石白色光。 物体呈金属青铜色且无声。 物体悬停并缓慢移动，随后消失。 在目击事件发生前，一扇大门出现故障。 另一名证人也看到了该物体。

title: FBI September 2023 Sighting - Serial 5
title_zh: 联邦调查局2023年9月目击事件 - 序列号5
summary: This is an FBI 302 interview conducted with a US citizen regarding their first-hand account of a UAP encounter at a US test site. The witness described seeing a linear, metallic/gray object with a super bright white light, smaller than a 737 but larger than a drone, at approximately 5000 feet AGL. It moved east to west parallel to the ground, was visible for 5-10 seconds, then the light went out and the object vanished. The witness experienced psychological effects including being 'freaked out,' having 'weird dreams,' and trouble sleeping for two nights after the sighting.
summary_zh: 本文件系联邦调查局对一名美国公民进行的302号访谈记录，内容涉及其在美国某试验场亲身遭遇UAP（不明空中现象）的经历。目击者描述称，在距地约5000英尺处，观察到一个线形、金属/灰色物体，带有超亮白色光，其尺寸小于波音737，但大于无人机。该物体沿地面平行方向自东向西移动，可见5-10秒后，光线熄灭，物体随即消失。目击者在目击事件后，经历了心理影响，包括感到“惊恐不安”、“怪异梦境”以及连续两晚失眠。
bust_reasoning: The bust score of 60 reflects genuine uncertainty. While the witness provided a detailed description of a 'linear object with a super bright light' that was 'metallic/gray' and lacked 'wings or exhaust' for its substantial size (1-2 Blackhawk helicopters), the observation was brief (5-10 seconds) and from a single visual witness. The lack of corroborating sensor data or successful multi-witness observation prevents a lower score, as a mundane explanation involving an unusual angle, lighting, or atmospheric effect on a known object remains plausible, despite the unusual features.
bust_reasoning_zh: 驳斥分数为60，反映出真实的不确定性。尽管目击者详细描述了一个“带有超亮光的线形物体”，其呈“金属/灰色”，且以其相当大的尺寸（一至两架“黑鹰”直升机）而言，缺乏“机翼或排气装置”，但此次观察时间短暂（5-10秒），且仅来自单一目视证人。缺乏佐证的传感器数据或成功的多目击者观察，使得无法给出更低的分数，因为尽管存在不寻常的特征，但涉及已知物体在不寻常的角度、光照或大气效应下的平凡解释仍然合理。
claims: Witness observed a linear, metallic/gray object with a super bright white light. Object was smaller than a 737, 1-2 Blackhawk helicopters in length, and bigger than a drone. Object was approximately 5000 feet AGL and moved east to west parallel to the ground. Object was visible for 5-10 seconds before the light went out and it vanished. Witness experienced psychological distress and sleep disturbances after the sighting.
claims_zh: 目击者观察到一个线形、金属/灰色物体，带有超亮白色光。 该物体小于波音737，长度相当于一至两架“黑鹰”直升机，且大于无人机。 该物体距地约5000英尺，沿地面平行方向自东向西移动。 该物体可见5-10秒后，光线熄灭并消失。 目击者在目击事件后经历了心理困扰和睡眠障碍。

title: DOW-UAP-D33, Mission Report, Greece, October 2023
summary: A U.S. military operator observed a UAP flying just above the surface of the ocean water. The UAP took multiple 90-degree turns at an estimated 80 MPH before being lost from the feed.
summary_zh: 一名美国军事操作员观察到一UAP在海面正上方飞行。该UAP以估计80英里/小时的速度进行了多次90度转弯，随后从信号源中消失。
claims: UAP observed flying just above the surface of the ocean water UAP took multiple 90-degree turns UAP moved at an estimated 80 MPH UAP was seemingly circular UAP was too small to make out details
claims_zh: 观察到UAP在海面正上方飞行 UAP进行了多次90度转弯 UAP以估计80英里/小时的速度移动 UAP疑似圆形 UAP过小无法辨别细节

title: DOW-UAP-D35, Mission Report, Greece, October 2023
summary: A U.S. military operator conducting an ISR mission observed a seemingly circular UAP flying just above the surface of the ocean water towards land. The UAP was lost from the observation feed shortly after observation. The observer assessed the UAP as benign and not under intelligent control.
bust_reasoning: The bust score is high due to multiple factors pointing towards a mundane explanation. The object's description is vague ('seemingly circular, too small to make out details'), its behavior is entirely prosaic ('flew straight,' 'no observed maneuverability'), and the observer explicitly assessed 'NO' intelligent control and 'NONE' for UAP signatures. The estimated 30 MPH velocity is also consistent with many known small objects. While multiple sensors (FMV, SIGINT, G-MESH) were available for the mission, the report does not indicate convergent detection or anomalous returns from SIGINT or G-MESH for the UAP, suggesting it was primarily an FMV observation that was 'lost from their feed' without further interrogation.
claims: A UAP was observed by a U.S. military operator during an ISR mission. The UAP was described as seemingly circular and too small to make out details. The UAP was flying just above the surface of the ocean water. The UAP flew straight above the ocean towards land. The UAP was lost from the observation feed. The observer assessed the UAP as benign and not under intelligent control.

title: DOW-UAP-D23, Mission Report, United Arab Emirates, October 2023
title_zh: DOW-UAP-D23，任务报告，阿拉伯联合酋长国，2023年10月
summary: This document is a Mission Report (MISREP) from the Department of War, submitted on October 31, 2023, detailing operations in the Persian Gulf. A U.S. military operator reported observing two Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena (UAP) incidents on October 24, 2023, during an ISR mission. The first UAP was observed at 0241Z, showing a cold thermal signature and an estimated velocity of 320 MPH. The second UAP was observed at 0322Z, with an estimated velocity of 440 MPH. Both UAPs were assessed as benign and not under intelligent control. No maneuverability observations or effects on persons or equipment were noted. The report emphasizes that descriptive language reflects the reporter's subjective interpretation.
summary_zh: 本文件为一份任务报告 (MISREP)，由美国战争部于2023年10月31日提交，详细说明了在波斯湾的行动。一名美国军事操作员报告称，在2023年10月24日的一次ISR任务期间，观察到两起不明异常现象 (UAP) 事件。第一个UAP于0241Z被观察到，呈现出低温热特征，估计速度为320英里/小时。第二个UAP于0322Z被观察到，估计速度为440英里/小时。两个UAP均被评估为无害且不受智能控制。未观察到机动性，亦未发现对人员或设备产生影响。报告强调，描述性语言反映了报告员的主观解读。
bust_reasoning: The document explicitly states the UAPs were 'not under intelligent control' and showed 'no maneuverability,' which strongly points towards a prosaic explanation. The velocities (320-440 MPH) are within the range of conventional atmospheric objects, and the accuracy is 'estimated.' The 'cold thermal signature' is unusual but consistent with objects at high altitude or those not generating significant heat (e.g., balloons, certain types of debris). The lack of any descriptive details despite multi-sensor modalities suggests the objects were indistinct or too far to resolve, further supporting a mundane interpretation.
bust_reasoning_zh: 该文件明确指出UAP“不受智能控制”且“未观察到机动性”，这强烈指向一种平淡无奇的解释。速度（320-440英里/小时）在常规大气物体的范围内，且准确性为“估计”。“低温热特征”虽然不寻常，但与高空物体或不产生显著热量的物体（例如气球、某些类型的碎片）相符。尽管采用了多传感器模式，但缺乏任何描述性细节，这表明物体不清晰或距离太远无法分辨，进一步支持了世俗的解释。
claims: A U.S. military operator observed two UAPs. First UAP had a cold thermal signature and an estimated velocity of 320 MPH. Second UAP had an estimated velocity of 440 MPH. Both UAPs were assessed as benign. Both UAPs were assessed as not under intelligent control.
claims_zh: 一名美国军事操作员观察到两个UAP。 第一个UAP呈现低温热特征，估计速度为320英里/小时。 第二个UAP估计速度为440英里/小时。 两个UAP均被评估为无害。 两个UAP均被评估为不受智能控制。

title: DOW-UAP-D23, Mission Report, United Arab Emirates, October 2023
title_zh: DOW-UAP-D23，任务报告，阿拉伯联合酋长国，2023年10月
summary: A Mission Report (MISREP) from the Department of War detailing two UAP observations by a U.S. military aircraft during an ISR mission in the Persian Gulf on October 31, 2023. The UAPs were assessed as benign, solid objects, with unknown maneuverability and propulsion, and not under intelligent control. One UAP showed a cold thermal signature and an estimated velocity of 320 MPH, while the other had an estimated velocity of 440 MPH.
summary_zh: 一份来自美国战争部的任务报告 (MISREP)，详细说明了2023年10月31日一架美国军机在波斯湾执行ISR任务期间的两次UAP观测。这些UAP被评估为无害的固体物体，机动性和推进方式不明，且不受智能控制。其中一个UAP显示出低温热特征，估计速度为320英里/小时，而另一个的估计速度为440英里/小时。
bust_reasoning: The bust score is low because the document reports multi-sensor observations (IMINT, FMV, Thermal) by military operators of a 'solid object' moving at significant estimated velocities (320 MPH and 440 MPH). Crucially, one UAP exhibited a 'cold thermal signature,' which is highly anomalous for an object moving at such speeds and strongly resists easy prosaic explanations like conventional aircraft, balloons, or drones. The document explicitly states 'UAP' and 'UNK' for many characteristics, indicating an inability to identify the objects.
bust_reasoning_zh: 澄清度得分较低，因为该文件报告了军事操作员通过多传感器（IMINT、FMV、热成像）对以显著估计速度（320英里/小时和440英里/小时）移动的“固体物体”进行的观测。关键是，其中一个UAP表现出“低温热特征”，这对于以如此速度移动的物体来说是高度异常的，并且强烈抵制了诸如常规飞机、气球或无人机等简单的平实解释。该文件明确指出许多特征为“UAP”和“UNK”，表明无法识别这些物体。
claims: Two UAP incidents observed by a US military aircraft UAPs were solid objects UAPs were assessed as benign UAPs were not under intelligent control One UAP exhibited a cold thermal signature Estimated velocities of 320 MPH and 440 MPH for the two UAPs
claims_zh: 美国军机观测到两起UAP事件 UAP是固体物体 UAP被评估为无害 UAP不受智能控制 其中一个UAP表现出低温热特征 两个UAP的估计速度分别为320英里/小时和440英里/小时

title: DOW-UAP-D74, Mission Report, Syria, November 2023
summary: A U.S. military operator observed a UAP shaped like a bouncy ball while returning to base in Syria on November 9, 2023. The object approached from the south at near co-altitude, dropped in altitude, and safely passed the aircraft, maintaining a consistent speed of approximately 424 knots for at least 7 minutes. The observer assessed the UAP as benign, noting no emissions, no threat to safety, and no effects on the aircrew.
summary_zh: 2023年11月9日，一名美国军事操作员在叙利亚返航基地途中观察到一架形状如弹力球的UAP。该物体从南方以几乎与飞机同高度接近，随后下降高度，并安全地通过了飞机，以约424节的恒定速度飞行至少7分钟。观察员评估该UAP为良性，未发现任何排放物，对安全无威胁，且对机组人员无影响。
bust_reasoning: The bust score is 45 because the report describes a solid, 'bouncy ball' shaped object traveling at an estimated 424 knots for at least 7 minutes, observed via visual and full-motion video. This sustained high speed for an object of that description is unusual and resists easy explanation, placing it below the 'modest evidence' threshold. However, the velocity is explicitly stated as 'Estimated', and the report notes 'UAP Maneuverability Observations: NONE' and 'UAP Under Intelligent Control: NO', which reduces the perceived anomalousness and keeps it from being in the lowest bust score categories, as it suggests a non-maneuvering, non-intelligently controlled object, potentially a misidentified mundane craft or a highly unusual natural phenomenon/balloon.
bust_reasoning_zh: 驳斥评分为45，因为报告描述了一个固体、形状如“弹力球”的物体，通过目视和FMV观察到其以估计424节的速度飞行至少7分钟。这种描述的物体以如此高的速度持续飞行是不寻常的，难以轻易解释，使其低于“适度证据”的门槛。然而，速度明确标注为“估计”，且报告注明“UAP机动性观察：无”和“UAP是否受智能控制：否”，这降低了其异常性，并使其不属于最低驳斥评分类别，因为它表明它是一个非机动、非智能控制的物体，可能是被误认的普通飞行器或一种非常不寻常的自然现象/气球。
claims: UAP observed by military operator UAP shaped as a bouncy ball UAP traveled consistently at ~424 knots (483 mph) for at least 7 minutes UAP approached from the south at near co-altitude UAP dropped altitude and safely passed the aircraft No emissions detected from the UAP UAP was assessed as benign and not a threat No effects on aircrew or equipment
claims_zh: 军事操作员观察到UAP UAP形状如弹力球 UAP以约424节（483英里/小时）的速度持续飞行至少7分钟 UAP从南方以几乎与飞机同高度接近 UAP下降高度并安全地通过了飞机 未从UAP检测到任何排放物 UAP被评估为良性且不构成威胁 对机组人员或设备无影响

title: DOW-UAP-D25, Mission Report, Greece, January 2024
summary: A U.S. military operator observed one UAP during an ISR mission over the Mediterranean Sea on January 25, 2024. The UAP was estimated to be flying at approximately 434 knots. It was described as diamond-shaped with a non-maneuvering probe or tail at the bottom. The object was only visible through a Short-Wave Infrared (SWIR) sensor and maintained a steady flight path, increasing and decreasing its altitude profile without changing trajectory. The event lasted approximately two minutes. The observer assessed the UAP as benign.
summary_zh: 一名美国军事操作员于2024年1月25日在地中海上空执行ISR任务期间观察到一个UAP。该UAP估计以约434节的速度飞行。其被描述为菱形，底部带有一个不可机动的探头或尾部。该物体仅通过短波红外（SWIR）传感器可见，并保持稳定的飞行路径，升高和降低其高度剖面而未改变轨迹。该事件持续约两分钟。观察员评估该UAP为良性。
bust_reasoning: The bust score is 75 because the document presents modest evidence pointing toward a typical prosaic explanation. The observation relies on a single SWIR sensor, with no corroboration from other sensors or third-party witnesses. The UAP's behavior was non-maneuvering and did not respond to observer actions, which is consistent with known objects. While the 'diamond shape with a non-maneuvering probe or tail' is an unusual description, it could be a visual distortion or a feature of a known object (like an antenna on a balloon or drone) when viewed through SWIR, especially given the estimated kinematics and short 2-minute duration.
bust_reasoning_zh: 驳斥评分为75分，因为该文件提供了适度的证据，指向一个典型的平淡解释。该观察依赖于单一SWIR传感器，没有其他传感器或第三方证人的佐证。UAP的行为是非机动的，且未对观察员行动作出反应，这与已知物体一致。尽管“底部带有一个不可机动的探头或尾部的菱形”是一个不寻常的描述，但通过SWIR观察时，这可能是一种视觉失真，或是已知物体（如气球或无人机上的天线）的特征，特别是考虑到估计的运动学特征和短暂的2分钟持续时间。
claims: A UAP was observed by a U.S. military operator. The UAP's speed was estimated at approximately 434 knots. The UAP was diamond-shaped with a non-maneuvering probe/tail. The UAP was only visible via a Short-Wave Infrared (SWIR) sensor. The event duration was approximately two minutes. The UAP maintained a steady flight path, increased and decreased altitude, but did not change trajectory. The observer assessed the UAP as benign.
claims_zh: 一名美国军事操作员观察到一个UAP。 该UAP的速度估计约为434节。 该UAP呈菱形，带有一个不可机动的探头/尾部。 该UAP仅通过短波红外（SWIR）传感器可见。 事件持续时间约为两分钟。 该UAP保持稳定的飞行路径，升高和降低高度，但未改变轨迹。 观察员评估该UAP为良性。

title: DOW-UAP-D27, Mission Report, United Arab Emirates, October 2023
title_zh: DOW-UAP-D27，任务报告，阿拉伯联合酋长国，2023年10月
summary: A U.S. military operator reported observing one UAP at an estimated altitude of approximately 24,000 feet over the Gulf of Oman. The UAP was described as a glowing hot spherical object with a vertical cylindrical pole/bar attached to its bottom, possibly a reflection in the water. It was flying straight just over the water at an estimated speed of 140 knots and showed no change in response to the observer's actions. The observer assessed the UAP as benign.
summary_zh: 一名美国军事操作员报告在阿曼湾上空观察到一个UAP，估计高度约24,000英尺。该UAP被描述为一个炽热发光的球形物体，底部附有一个垂直圆柱形杆/棒，可能为水面反射。它在水面上方直线飞行，估计速度为140节，且对观察员的操作无任何反应。观察员评估该UAP为良性。
bust_reasoning: The object's description as 'glowing hot spherical' with a 'vertical unwavering cylindrical pole/bar attached on the bottom' and 'poss reflection from the object in the water' is highly unusual. Its observed kinematics of 'flying straight just over the water at speed of 140 knots' are significant for a low-altitude object and imply a physical, powered craft. While the observer assessed 'NO Advanced Capabilities,' the specific visual and inferred IR signature, combined with the speed and low altitude, resist easy identification as a common mundane object, placing it in the 'genuinely uncertain' category.
bust_reasoning_zh: 该物体被描述为“炽热发光的球形”，底部附有“垂直且稳定的圆柱形杆/棒”，且“可能为物体在水中的反射”，此描述极不寻常。其观察到的运动学特征为“在水面上方直线飞行，速度为140节”，对于一个低空物体而言意义重大，暗示其为一种物理的、有动力的飞行器。尽管观察员评估“无先进能力”，但其特定的视觉特征和推断的红外特征，结合其速度和低空飞行，使其难以被轻易识别为常见的普通物体，从而将其归类为“确实不确定”类别。
claims: One UAP observed by a US military operator. UAP described as a "glowing hot spherical unidentified object with a vertical unwavering cylindrical pole/bar attached on the bottom". UAP was flying straight just over the water at 140 knots. Observer's aircraft was at 23,999 ft, speed 163 knots. UAP showed no change in response to observer actions. Observer assessed the UAP as benign.
claims_zh: 一名美国军事操作员观察到一个UAP。 UAP被描述为“一个炽热发光的球形不明物体，底部附有一个垂直且稳定的圆柱形杆/棒”。 UAP在水面上方直线飞行，速度为140节。 观察员的飞机高度为23,999英尺，速度为163节。 UAP对观察员的操作无任何反应。 观察员评估该UAP为良性。

title: DOW-UAP-D75, Mission Report, Gulf of Aden, July 2024
summary: A U.S. military operator conducting an Intelligence, Surveillance, and Reconnaissance (ISR) mission in the Gulf of Aden on July 14, 2024, observed one Unidentified Anomalous Phenomenon (UAP). The UAP maintained a straight flight path at a constant altitude and its speed was noted as faster than the observing aircraft's flying speed. The operator assessed the object as benign and followed it until the distance became too far. The primary sensor used was Full Motion Video (FMV).
summary_zh: 2024年7月14日，一名美国军事操作员在亚丁湾执行情报、监视与侦察（ISR）任务时，观察到一个不明异常现象（UAP）。该UAP保持直线飞行路径，高度恒定，其速度被记录为快于观察飞机的飞行速度。操作员评估该物体为无害，并对其进行跟踪，直至距离过远。主要传感器为全动态视频（FMV）。
bust_reasoning: The report describes a single UAP observed via FMV maintaining a straight flight path at a consistent altitude, assessed as benign. The primary anomalous characteristic is its speed, noted as 'faster than the [observing aircraft's] flying speed.' However, the observing aircraft's type and speed, as well as the UAP's estimated velocity and physical description, are heavily redacted. Without this crucial context or multi-sensor corroboration, a mundane explanation such as a fast conventional aircraft or missile cannot be definitively ruled out, despite the speed differential. The single sensor and witness, combined with the lack of extreme kinematics beyond unquantified speed, place it in the 'genuinely uncertain' category.
bust_reasoning_zh: 该报告描述了一个通过FMV观察到的单一UAP，其保持直线飞行路径，高度一致，并被评估为无害。其主要异常特征是其速度，被记录为“快于[观察飞机]的飞行速度”。然而，观察飞机的型号和速度，以及UAP的估计速度和物理描述，均被大量删节。在缺乏这一关键背景信息或多传感器佐证的情况下，尽管存在速度差异，但仍无法明确排除诸如快速常规飞机或导弹等普通解释。单一传感器和目击者，加上除了未量化速度之外缺乏极端运动学特征，使其归入“真正不确定”类别。
claims: One UAP was observed during an ISR mission The UAP maintained a straight flight path at a constant altitude The UAP's speed was faster than the observing aircraft's flying speed The observer assessed the UAP as benign The observer followed the UAP until it was too far to continue observation
claims_zh: 在一次ISR任务中观察到一个UAP 该UAP保持直线飞行路径，高度恒定 该UAP的速度快于观察飞机的飞行速度 观察者评估该UAP为无害 观察者跟踪该UAP，直至距离过远无法继续观察

title: DOW-UAP-D28, Mission Report, Iraq, September 2024
summary: U.S. military operators conducting an armed overwatch mission and weapons calibration in Iraq observed an Unidentified Aerial Phenomena (UAP) during a PGM shot. The UAP was seen as a lens flare via MX-20 and MX-25 IR sensors, moving at a high rate of speed through the aircraft's sensor field-of-view. The reporter assessed the flare was associated with a significant heat source. The report notes that descriptive language reflects subjective interpretation and not conclusive indications of object features.
bust_reasoning: The bust score is high because the document's metadata itself provides a strong mundane explanation ('lens flare'), and the observation occurred during a PGM shot, a context highly prone to sensor artifacts or debris. The narrative is very sparse on details that would challenge these prosaic explanations, such as specific, anomalous kinematics or confirmed multi-sensor detection of an object with properties inconsistent with known craft or phenomena.
claims: UAP observed during a PGM shot UAP appeared as a lens flare on MX-20 and MX-25 IR sensors UAP moved at a high rate of speed Flare was associated with a significant heat source

title: DOW-UAP-D32, Mission Report, Syria, October 2024
summary: A U.S. military operator reported observing a 'misshapen and uneven ball of white light' during an ISR mission. The operator described multiple 'glares or light' emanating from an 'unknown origin' and a 'light/glare halo effect' at the top of the Full-Motion Video (FMV) feed. The aircrew assessed the UAP as benign with no mission impact or change, and not a lasing event.
summary_zh: 一名美国军事操作员在一次ISR任务中报告观察到一个“形状不规则且不均匀的白色光球”。该操作员描述了多个“眩光或光线”源自“未知来源”，并在全动态视频（FMV）画面顶部出现“光/眩光光晕效应”。机组人员评估该UAP为良性，对任务无影响或改变，且并非激光照射事件。
claims: UAP observed as a misshapen and uneven ball of white light Multiple glares or light from unknown origin observed at different angles and directions Light/glare halo effect observed at the top of the FMV feed Aircrew assessed the UAP as benign with no mission impact The event was assessed not to be a lasing event
claims_zh: 观察到UAP为形状不规则且不均匀的白色光球 观察到多个眩光或光线从未知来源以不同角度和方向出现 在FMV画面顶部观察到光/眩光光晕效应 机组人员评估该UAP为良性，对任务无影响 该事件被评估并非激光照射事件

title: DOW-UAP-D32, Mission Report, Syria, October 2024
summary: A U.S. military operator conducting an ISR mission in Syria observed an Unidentified Aerial Phenomenon (UAP) on October 20, 2024. The UAP was described as a "misshapen and uneven ball of white light" and "multiple glares or light from unknown origin." The phenomenon included lights/glares crossing the Full-Motion Video (FMV) camera feed and a "light/glare halo effect" at the top of the FMV feed. Aircrew assessed the UAP as benign with no mission impact or change, and determined it was not a lasing event. The UAP's physical state was identified as plasma, with unknown propulsion.
summary_zh: 一名美国军事操作员于2024年10月20日在叙利亚执行ISR任务时，观察到一个不明空中现象 (UAP)。该UAP被描述为“一个变形且不规则的白色光球”以及“多个未知来源的眩光或光线”。该现象包括光线/眩光穿过全动态视频 (FMV) 摄像机画面，以及在FMV画面顶部出现的“光线/眩光光晕效应”。机组人员评估该UAP为良性，对任务无影响或改变，并确定其并非激光照射事件。该UAP的物理状态被识别为等离子体，推进方式未知。
bust_reasoning: The bust score is 75 because the document's description of the UAP as 'multiple glares or light from unknown origin' with a 'halo effect' and 'crossed directly on the FMV camera' strongly points to a camera artifact or optical phenomenon. The report explicitly states 'Observation Interrogation of UAP: NO' and 'UAP RF Frequency: -', indicating no corroborating sensor data beyond the visual observation from the FMV camera, despite other sensors being available for the mission. The aircrew assessed the event as 'Benign' and having 'no mission impact or change', further suggesting a non-anomalous explanation.
bust_reasoning_zh: 该事件的“揭穿”评分为75，原因在于该文件对UAP的描述，即“多个未知来源的眩光或光线”，伴有“光晕效应”并“直接穿过FMV摄像机画面”，强烈指向摄像机伪影或光学现象。报告明确指出“UAP观察审讯：否”和“UAP射频频率：-”，表明除了FMV摄像机的视觉观察外，没有其他传感器数据可供佐证，尽管任务中配备了其他传感器。机组人员评估该事件为“良性”，且“对任务无影响或改变”，这进一步暗示了一个非异常的解释。
claims: Observation of a "misshapen and uneven ball of white light" Multiple "glares or light from unknown origin" observed at different angles and directions A "light/glare halo effect" was seen at the top of the FMV feed The UAP was assessed as benign with no mission impact The event was not considered a lasing event UAP physical state described as "Plasma" UAP propulsion means "UNKNOWN"
claims_zh: 观察到一个“变形且不规则的白色光球” 观察到多个“未知来源的眩光或光线”，出现在不同角度和方向 在FMV画面顶部观察到“光线/眩光光晕效应” 该UAP被评估为良性，对任务无影响 该事件不被视为激光照射事件 UAP物理状态被描述为“等离子体” UAP推进方式为“未知”

title: DOW-UAP-D32, Mission Report, Syria, October 2024
summary:
This document is a Mission Report (MISREP), a standardized reporting form the U.S. Military uses to record the circumstances surrounding its operations. U.S. military services often use MISREPs to report Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena (UAP) to AARO. The GENTEXT, or “general text” section of these reports often contains important qualitative, contextual information, distinguishing it from the more quantitative, or numerical, data found elsewhere in the report.
A U.S. military operator reported observing a “misshapen and uneven ball of white light,” describing multiple “glares or light” emanating from an “unknown origin.” The reporter described the UAP as a “light/glare halo effect” at the top of the Full-Motion Video (FMV) feed.
All descriptive and estimative language contained in this report reflects the reporter’s subjective interpretation at the time of the event. Such characterizations should not be interpreted as a conclusive indication of the presence or absence of any intrinsic object features or performance characteristics.
summary_zh: 本文件为一份任务报告 (MISREP)，系美国军方用于记录其行动情况的标准化报告表格。美国军事部门常利用MISREP向AARO报告不明异常现象 (UAP)。此类报告的GENTEXT，即“通用文本”部分，通常包含重要的定性、背景信息，有别于报告中其他部分的定量或数值数据。一名美国军事操作员报告观察到一个“形状不规则且不均匀的白色光球”，并描述有多个“眩光或光线”源自“未知来源”。报告员将该UAP描述为全动态视频 (FMV) 画面顶部的“光/眩光光晕效应”。本报告中所有描述性和评估性语言均反映了报告员在事件发生时的主观解读。此类描述不应被解读为任何固有物体特征或性能参数存在与否的决定性指示。
bust_reasoning: The document provides a detailed description of the UAP that is highly consistent with an optical artifact or camera anomaly. The observation is limited to a single sensor (FMV), lacks corroborating data from other sensors, and reports no anomalous kinematics or behavior. The aircrew's assessment that it was 'not a lasing event' but still a 'light/glare' further supports a prosaic optical explanation, placing it firmly in the high bust score range.
bust_reasoning_zh: 该文件对UAP的详细描述与光学伪影或摄像机异常高度吻合。该观测仅限于单一传感器 (FMV)，缺乏其他传感器的佐证数据，且未报告异常运动学或行为。机组人员评估其“并非激光事件”但仍为“光/眩光”，进一步支持了平淡无奇的光学解释，使其被判定为高度可解释事件。

title: DOW-UAP-D52, Email Correspondance, NA, August 2024
title_zh: DOW-UAP-D52，电子邮件通信，不适用，2024年8月
summary: This document is email correspondence describing the content of a mission report and requesting clarification on its content, specifically the approval to include the year of the incident in an unclassified tear line. The incident involved a U.S. Aircraft observing a possible UAP for over 2 hours.
summary_zh: 本文件为电子邮件通信，描述一份任务报告的内容，并请求对其内容进行澄清，特别是关于批准将事件年份纳入非密级摘要行的请求。该事件涉及一架美国飞机对一个可能的UAP进行了超过2小时的观察。
bust_reasoning: The document describes a single-sensor (visual) observation of an 'oval/orb shaped' object 'likely moving at a low speed' for 'over 2 hours'. While the duration is notable, the description lacks any anomalous kinematics or multi-sensor corroboration. These characteristics are consistent with several mundane explanations, particularly a high-altitude balloon or a distant, slow-moving aircraft/drone, which would not resist such observations.
bust_reasoning_zh: 该文件描述了对一个物体的单传感器（视觉）观察，该物体呈“椭圆形/球形”，可能“以低速移动”，持续“超过2小时”。尽管观察持续时间值得注意，但描述中缺乏任何异常运动学特征或多传感器佐证。这些特征与几种常见解释相符，特别是高空 H气球或远距离、低速移动的飞机/无人机，此类物体不会抵制此类观察。
claims: U.S Aircraft observed a possible UAP UAP appeared oval/orb shaped UAP was likely moving at a low speed U.S Aircraft had eyes on the UAP for over 2 hours
claims_zh: 美国飞机观察到一个可能的UAP UAP呈椭圆形/球形 UAP可能以低速移动 美国飞机对该UAP进行了超过2小时的观察

title: FBI Photo B19
summary: The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) submitted a report of an unidentified anomalous phenomenon (UAP) to the All-domain Anomaly Resolution Office (AARO) consisting of a still image derived from a U.S. military system in 2025. The original imagery was altered with redactions before being submitted to AARO. An accompanying mission report was not provided. The operator reported that they were unable to positively identify the UAP. The date in the image is incorrect due to system date/time not being set. The monochrome image displays a grainy texture with a central crosshair reticle. A small cluster of dark pixels, forming an object, is visible at the exact center of the reticle.
summary_zh: 联邦调查局 (FBI) 于2025年向全域异常解决办公室 (AARO) 提交了一份关于不明异常现象 (UAP) 的报告，其中包含一张源自美国军事系统的静态图像。原始图像在提交给AARO之前经过了编辑和删节。未提供随附的任务报告。操作员报告称无法明确识别该UAP。图像中的日期不正确，系因系统日期/时间未设置所致。该单色图像呈现颗粒状纹理，中央带有十字线分划板。一个由暗像素组成的小团块，形成一个物体，在分划板的正中心可见。
bust_reasoning: The document provides only a single, low-quality, grainy, monochrome image showing a small, pixelated object at the center of a crosshair. There is no description of behavior, kinematics, or corroborating sensor data or witnesses. This lack of detail and corroboration makes it impossible to rule out numerous mundane explanations, placing it firmly in the high bust score range.
bust_reasoning_zh: 该文件仅提供了一张低质量、颗粒状的单色图像，显示一个小型像素化物体位于十字线中心。没有关于行为、运动学或佐证传感器数据或目击者的描述。这种缺乏细节和佐证的情况使得无法排除众多世俗解释，从而使其明确属于高度可解释的范畴。
claims: FBI submitted a report of a UAP to AARO Still image derived from a U.S. military system Original imagery was altered with redactions Accompanying mission report was not provided Operator unable to positively identify the UAP Image date 12/31/99 is incorrect due to system date/time not being set Monochrome image displays grainy texture with central crosshair reticle Small cluster of dark pixels, forming an object, visible at the exact center of the reticle
claims_zh: 联邦调查局向AARO提交了一份UAP报告 源自美国军事系统的静态图像 原始图像经过了编辑和删节 未提供随附的任务报告 操作员无法明确识别UAP 图像日期12/31/99不正确，系因系统日期/时间未设置所致 单色图像呈现颗粒状纹理，中央带有十字线分划板 一个由暗像素组成的小团块，形成一个物体，在分划板的正中心可见

title: DOW-UAP-D50, Email Correspondence, INDOPACOM, April 2025
summary: This document is email correspondence describing the content of a mission report and requesting clarification on its content. The emails confirm the unclassified nature of 'tearlines' detailing UAP observations by US aircraft on April 10 and 11, 2025, within the INDOPACOM AOR. The observations involved a single UAP flying at unknown altitude and speed, with no noted interference.
summary_zh: 本文件为电子邮件通信，描述了一份任务报告的内容并请求对其内容进行澄清。这些电子邮件确认了2025年4月10日和11日美国飞机在INDOPACOM责任区内观测到UAP的“tearlines”（摘要）为非密性质。观测涉及一个单一的UAP，以未知高度和未知速度飞行，未发现任何干扰。
bust_reasoning: The bust score is high because the document provides extremely minimal information about the observed object. The descriptions 'UNK ALTITUDE AND UNK SPEED' and 'NO INTERFERENCE WAS NOTED' offer no anomalous characteristics or features that resist a mundane explanation. The sightings were brief (12 and 23 seconds), and only a single sensor (visual) is implied. The term 'POSS UAP' simply means 'possibly unidentified,' not 'anomalous,' and the lack of any descriptive details makes it impossible to rule out common prosaic explanations.
bust_reasoning_zh: 驳斥得分较高，原因在于该文件对所观测物体提供的信息极少。“未知高度和未知速度”以及“未发现干扰”的描述未能提供任何异常特征或特性，无法排除世俗解释。观测时间短暂（12秒和23秒），且仅暗示使用单一传感器（目视）。“POSS UAP”一词仅指“可能未识别”，而非“异常”，且缺乏任何描述性细节，使得无法排除常见的平淡解释。
claims: US aircraft observed 1x poss UAP for 12 seconds at 2353Z on 10APR25 US aircraft observed 1x poss UAP for 23 seconds at 0007Z on 11APR25 UAP flying at unknown altitude and unknown speed No interference was noted
claims_zh: 美国飞机于2025年4月10日2353Z观测到1个可能是UAP的物体，持续12秒 美国飞机于2025年4月11日0007Z观测到1个可能是UAP的物体，持续23秒 UAP以未知高度和未知速度飞行 未发现任何干扰

title: 38_143685_box_Incident_Summaries_173-233
summary: This document is a collection of incident summary sheets, numbered 173 through 233, transmitted by Air Material Command. Each summary includes a 'Check-List - Unidentified Flying Objects' and may contain witness lists or statements. Incident #173, detailed within, describes a visual observation on 15 September 1945, at 1700 CST, 3 miles SE of Shreveport, LA, by ground observer George Akers.
summary_zh: 本文件系一系列事件摘要表，编号173至233，由空军物资司令部呈报。每份摘要均包含一份“不明飞行物核查清单”，并可能附有目击者名单或陈述。其中详述的第173号事件，系地面观察员乔治·艾克斯于1945年9月15日中部标准时间17时，在路易斯安那州什里夫波特东南3英里处进行的一次目视观察。
bust_reasoning: The document provides only basic metadata for Incident #173, including the date, time, location, and observer's name. Crucially, it contains no description of the object's appearance, behavior, or any other details that would allow for an assessment of its nature or a comparison against mundane explanations. Without any narrative or descriptive information, the incident is not assessable for its 'mundaneness' or 'anomalousness'.
bust_reasoning_zh: 该文件仅提供了第173号事件的基本元数据，包括日期、时间、地点及观察员姓名。关键在于，其未包含对该物体外观、行为或任何其他细节的描述，无法据此评估其性质或与常规解释进行比对。鉴于缺乏叙述性或描述性信息，该事件无法就其“寻常性”或“异常性”进行评估。
claims: Document transmits incident summary sheets 173 through 233. Incident #173 involves an observation of object(s) 3 miles SE of Shreveport, LA. Incident #173 occurred on 15 September 1945 at 1700 Central Standard Time. George Akers was the ground observer for Incident #173.
claims_zh: 文件呈报了编号173至233的事件摘要表。 第173号事件涉及在路易斯安那州什里夫波特东南3英里处对不明物体进行的观察。 第173号事件发生于1945年9月15日中部标准时间17时。 乔治·艾克斯系第173号事件的地面观察员。

title: DOW-UAP-D4, Mission Report, Arabian Gulf, 2020
summary: A U.S. military operator observed a possible UAP at 1258Z near grid reference 34SDG9041417044. The UAP's velocity was estimated at 321 knots, and it subsequently increased speed and changed direction towards the east. Brief observation prevented altitude estimates.
summary_zh: 一名美国军事操作员于协调世界时1258在网格参考34SDG9041417044附近观察到一个疑似UAP。该UAP的速度估计为321节，随后其速度增加并向东改变方向。由于观察时间短暂，未能估算UAP的高度。
bust_reasoning: The report describes a visual observation of an object with an estimated velocity of 321 knots that increased speed and changed direction. While this speed is notable, it is well within the capabilities of conventional aircraft or missiles. The 'brief observation' and lack of altitude estimates, combined with only a single sensor modality (visual), severely limit the ability to rule out prosaic explanations. There are no reported kinematics or signatures that resist a mundane explanation, placing it firmly in the 'modest evidence pointing toward a typical prosaic explanation' category.
bust_reasoning_zh: 该报告描述了对一个物体的目视观察，其估计速度为321节，并曾加速和改变方向。尽管此速度引人注目，但其完全在常规飞机或导弹的能力范围之内。“短暂观察”以及缺乏高度估算，加之仅有单一传感器模式（目视），严重限制了排除普通解释的能力。没有报告任何运动学特征或信号能够抵制普通解释，因此将其归类为“指向典型普通解释的适度证据”。
claims: A UAP was observed The UAP's velocity was estimated at 321 knots The UAP increased speed The UAP changed direction towards the east
claims_zh: 观察到一个UAP UAP的速度估计为321节 UAP速度增加 UAP向东改变方向

title: DOW-UAP-D5, Mission Report, Arabian Gulf, 2020
summary: This document is a Mission Report (MISREP) from the Department of War, detailing UAP observations. A U.S. military operator observed a UAP traveling at 40 knots between FL160 and FL170, maintaining constant speed. Later, the same operator observed two possible UAPs traveling at an estimated 278 knots, which then increased speed and changed direction towards the south. The report contains qualitative and contextual information in the GENTEXT section.
summary_zh: 本文件为一份来自美国战争部的任务报告（MISREP），详细说明了UAP观测情况。一名美国军事操作员观测到一个UAP以40节的速度在FL160至FL170空层之间飞行，并保持恒定速度。随后，同一操作员观测到两个可能的UAP以估计278节的速度飞行，随后加速并向南改变方向。该报告在GENTEXT部分包含定性和背景信息。
bust_reasoning: The bust score is relatively high due to the single visual sensor modality and the lack of truly anomalous kinematic features. While the objects were unidentified by the military operator, their described speeds (40 knots and an estimated 278 knots) and behaviors (constant speed, increasing speed, changing direction) are all plausible for known prosaic objects such as high-altitude balloons, drones, or conventional aircraft. The use of 'estimated' velocity and 'possible UAPs' for the second event further reduces the certainty of an anomalous explanation. There is no multi-sensor corroboration or any reported behavior that resists easy explanation.
bust_reasoning_zh: 驳斥得分相对较高，原因在于单一视觉传感器模式且缺乏真正异常的运动学特征。尽管这些物体未被军事操作员识别，但其描述的速度（40节和估计278节）和行为（恒定速度、加速、改变方向）对于已知普通物体，如高空 H气球、无人机或常规飞机而言，均属合理。第二次事件中“估计”速度和“可能的UAP”的表述进一步降低了异常解释的确定性。缺乏多传感器佐证，也无任何难以解释的报告行为。
claims: A U.S. military operator observed 1x UAP traveling at 40 knots at FL160 to FL170, maintaining constant speed. A U.S. military operator observed 2x possible UAPs traveling at an estimated 278 knots. The UAPs increased speed and changed direction towards the south.
claims_zh: 一名美国军事操作员观测到1个UAP以40节的速度在FL160至FL170空层飞行，并保持恒定速度。 一名美国军事操作员观测到2个可能的UAP以估计278节的速度飞行。 这些UAP加速并向南改变方向。

title: DOW-UAP-D54, Mission Report, Mediterranean Sea, NA
title_zh: DOW-UAP-D54，任务报告，地中海，不适用
summary: A U.S. military operator reported observing one UAP during RTB (Return To Base) at 1319Z while transiting over 363453N 0255943E. The UAP was described as triangular and metallic, flying at an estimated altitude of 24,989 feet MSL and a speed of 168 knots.
summary_zh: 一名美国军事操作员报告称，在返航（RTB）期间，于协调世界时13时19分，经过北纬36度34分53秒、东经25度59分43秒上空时，观察到一个UAP。该UAP被描述为三角形且呈金属质感，以估计海平面24,989英尺的高度和168节的速度飞行。
bust_reasoning: The report details a multi-sensor detection (visual and unspecified sensor) of a 'triangular and metallic UAP' with specific altitude (24,989ft MSL) and speed (168KTS). While the kinematics are not anomalous for known aircraft, the object's specific description and the fact it was designated a UAP by a U.S. military operator, combined with sensor corroboration, suggest it was not readily identifiable as a prosaic object. The document itself does not provide a mundane explanation.
bust_reasoning_zh: 该报告详细描述了多传感器探测（视觉和未指明传感器）到一个“三角形且呈金属质感的UAP”，具有特定高度（海平面24,989英尺）和速度（168节）。尽管其运动学特征对于已知飞机而言并非异常，但该物体的具体描述以及其被一名美国军事操作员指定为UAP的事实，结合传感器佐证，表明它并非易于识别的普通物体。该文件本身未提供任何世俗解释。
claims: One UAP detected UAP described as triangular and metallic UAP observed at 1319Z UAP observed over 363453N 0255943E UAP flying at an altitude of 24,989ft MSL UAP flying at a speed of 168KTS
claims_zh: 探测到一个UAP UAP被描述为三角形且呈金属质感 UAP于协调世界时13时19分被观察到 UAP在北纬36度34分53秒、东经25度59分43秒上空被观察到 UAP以海平面24,989英尺的高度飞行 UAP以168节的速度飞行

title: DOW-UAP-D6, Mission Report, Arabian Gulf, 2020
summary: This document is a Mission Report (MISREP), a standardized reporting form the U.S. Military uses to record the circumstances surrounding its operations and report Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena (UAP) to AARO. A U.S. military operator reported observing a probable UAP at 1246Z near coordinates 3SKT4255899519. The observation had no mission impact, and the operator continued original tasking. All descriptive and estimative language reflects the reporter’s subjective interpretation and should not be interpreted as a conclusive indication of any intrinsic object features or performance characteristics.
summary_zh: 本文件为一份任务报告（MISREP），该报告是美国军方用于记录其行动情况并向AARO报告不明异常现象（UAP）的标准化报告表格。一名美国军事操作员报告称，于1246Z在坐标3SKT4255899519附近观察到一个“可能的不明异常现象”（probable UAP）。该观察未对任务造成影响，操作员继续执行原定任务。所有描述性和评估性语言均反映报告员的主观判断，不应被解读为对任何物体固有特征或性能的结论性指示。
bust_reasoning: The bust score is high because the document provides almost no information about the observed object. The only detail is that a U.S. military operator observed a 'probable UAP' (meaning unidentified) at a specific location. There are no descriptions of its appearance, behavior, kinematics, or any corroborating sensor data. This complete lack of detail makes it impossible to distinguish from a mundane misidentification.
bust_reasoning_zh: 驳斥度较高，原因在于该文件几乎未提供关于所观察物体的任何信息。唯一细节是一名美国军事操作员在特定地点观察到一个“可能的不明异常现象”（即不明物体）。报告中没有关于其外观、行为、运动学特征或任何佐证传感器数据的描述。这种细节的完全缺失使得无法将其与普通的误识别区分开来。
claims: A U.S. military operator observed a probable UAP.
claims_zh: 一名美国军事操作员观察到一个可能的不明异常现象。

title: DOW-UAP-D7, Mission Report, Arabian Gulf, 2020
summary: A U.S. military operator reported observing a UAP, describing it as looking like a balloon and traveling with the winds at approximately 31,000 ft. The UAP was visually identified and tracked via an onboard infrared sensor (TFLIR).
summary_zh: 一名美国军事操作员报告观察到一架UAP，将其描述为形似气球，并随风以约31,000英尺的高度飞行。该UAP经目视识别，并通过机载红外传感器（TFLIR）进行追踪。
bust_reasoning: The bust score is high because the document itself provides a strong mundane explanation: the object 'LOOKS LIKE A BALLOON' and its behavior 'TRAVELING WITH THE WINDS AT 31,000 FT MSL' are highly consistent with a balloon. This is a direct observation and description by the military operator, placing it firmly in the category where the document names a prosaic source.
bust_reasoning_zh: 该驳斥得分较高，因为文件本身提供了一个强有力的世俗解释：该物体“形似气球”，及其行为“随风在31,000英尺平均海平面高度飞行”与气球高度一致。这是军事操作员的直接观察和描述，将其牢固地归类为文件指明世俗来源的范畴。
claims: A UAP was observed by a U.S. military operator. The UAP was described as looking like a balloon. The UAP was traveling with the winds at 31,000 ft MSL. The UAP was visually identified and tracked using a TFLIR sensor.
claims_zh: 一名美国军事操作员观察到一架UAP。 该UAP被描述为形似气球。 该UAP随风在31,000英尺平均海平面高度飞行。 该UAP经目视识别，并使用TFLIR传感器进行追踪。

title: DOW-UAP-D8, Mission Report, Djibouti, 2025
summary: This document is a Mission Report (MISREP) detailing a UAP sighting. A U.S. military operator observed two "white hot UAPs" moving dynamically south at approximately 240 nautical miles per hour (276 mph) in the Mediterranean Sea. The report includes qualitative and contextual information in the GENTEXT section.
summary_zh: 本文件系一份任务报告（MISREP），详述一起UAP目击事件。一名美国军事操作员在地中海观察到两个“白热UAP”以约每小时240海里（276英里/小时）的速度动态向南移动。该报告在GENTEXT部分包含定性及背景信息。
bust_reasoning: The bust score of 60 reflects that while the observation of two 'round white hot UAPs' moving at 240 knots is specific, it is genuinely uncertain and highly plausible for known craft. The 'white hot' description strongly suggests an infrared signature, even if broadly categorized as 'visual' in the metadata. The lack of multiple independent sensors or witnesses, combined with kinematics (240 knots) that are fast but not anomalous, prevents a lower score. The description fits well within the capabilities and appearance of military drones or aircraft observed via IR.
bust_reasoning_zh: 60分的“破解”评分反映出，尽管对两个以240节速度移动的“圆形白热UAP”的观察是具体的，但其真实性存疑，且对于已知飞行器而言高度合理。“白热”描述强烈暗示红外特征，即使在元数据中被广义归类为“视觉”。缺乏多个独立传感器或目击者，加之其运动学特征（240节）虽快但不异常，阻止了更低的评分。该描述与通过红外（IR）观察到的军用无人机或飞机的功能和外观高度吻合。
claims: Two round white hot UAPs observed UAPs moving dynamically south Estimated speed of 240 nautical miles per hour
claims_zh: 观察到两个圆形白热UAP UAP动态向南移动 估计速度为每小时240海里

title: NASA-UAP-D6, Apollo 17 Technical Crew Debriefing, 1973
title_zh: 美国国家航空航天局-UAP-D6，阿波罗17号技术乘员汇报，1973年
summary: Excerpt from the Apollo 17 Technical Crew Debriefing on January 4, 1973, where astronaut Harrison Schmitt reported seeing continuous light flashes during the flight, including one he thought was on the lunar surface. He noted the flashes were not visible during the ALFMED experiment with blindfolds on, but reappeared later.
summary_zh: 摘录自1973年1月4日阿波罗17号技术乘员汇报。宇航员哈里森·施密特报告称在飞行期间持续观察到光闪，其中一次他认为发生在月球表面。他指出，在佩戴眼罩进行ALFMED实验时，这些光闪不可见，但随后再次出现。
bust_reasoning: The document provides strong evidence for a mundane explanation. Astronaut Harrison Schmitt's description of 'light flashes just about continuously during the whole flight when we were dark adapted' and their disappearance when blindfolded for the 'ALFMED experiment' (Apollo Light Flash Moving Emulsion Detector) directly points to cosmic ray visual phenomena. This is a well-documented physiological effect experienced by astronauts, and the ALFMED experiment was specifically designed to study it. The single 'flash on the lunar surface' could be a misinterpretation of one of these internal flashes or a very brief external event, but the primary and continuous observations are clearly explained by known physiological effects.
bust_reasoning_zh: 该文件为世俗解释提供了有力证据。宇航员哈里森·施密特描述的“在整个飞行期间，当我们适应黑暗后，光闪几乎持续不断”，以及在佩戴眼罩进行“ALFMED实验”（阿波罗光闪移动乳剂探测器）时它们的消失，直接指向宇宙射线视觉现象。这是一种宇航员普遍经历的、有充分记录的生理效应，且ALFMED实验正是为此目的而设计。单一的“月球表面闪光”可能是对这些内部闪光之一的误读，或是一个非常短暂的外部事件，但主要的、持续的观测结果可由已知的生理效应明确解释。
claims: Astronaut Harrison Schmitt reported seeing light flashes. Light flashes were observed continuously during the flight when dark adapted. One flash was perceived as being on the lunar surface. Light flashes were not visible during the ALFMED experiment with blindfolds on.
claims_zh: 宇航员哈里森·施密特报告称观察到光闪。 在适应黑暗后，飞行期间持续观察到光闪。 其中一次闪光被认为是发生在月球表面。 在佩戴眼罩进行ALFMED实验时，光闪不可见。

title: NASA-UAP-D7, Skylab Techincal Crew Debriefing 1973
title_zh: NASA-UAP-D7, 1973年天空实验室技术乘员汇报
summary: This document contains excerpts from Skylab 1/2, 1/3, and 1/4 technical crew debriefings. The Skylab 1/2 crew reported observing light flashes, some described as spots or streaks, often with eyes closed, and possibly cosmic particles. The Skylab 1/3 crew observed a bright reddish object, identified as a satellite in a very similar orbit, much brighter than planets, rotating with a 10-second period, and estimated 30-50 nautical miles away. Its specific identity was unknown. The Skylab 1/4 crew reported seeing flashing lights outside Skylab with definite relative motion, presumed to be Skylab debris or other satellites, some appearing to tumble.
summary_zh: 本文件包含摘录自天空实验室1/2、1/3和1/4号任务技术乘员汇报。天空实验室1/2号乘员报告观测到闪光，部分被描述为斑点或条纹，常在闭眼时出现，可能为宇宙粒子。天空实验室1/3号乘员观测到一个明亮的红色物体，被确认为一颗轨道非常相似的卫星，比行星亮得多，以10秒周期旋转，估计距离30-50海里。其具体身份不明。天空实验室1/4号乘员报告看到天空实验室外部有明显相对运动的闪光，推测为天空实验室碎片或其他卫星，部分似乎在翻滚。
bust_reasoning: The document describes two primary visual phenomena, both of which are strongly supported by mundane explanations. The 'light flashes' are a classic description of cosmic ray phosphenes, a well-documented physiological effect in space. The 'bright reddish object' was identified by the crew themselves as a satellite or debris, with observed behaviors (tumbling, varying brightness, similar orbit) that are entirely consistent with known orbital objects. The crew's lack of specific identification for the satellite does not indicate an anomalous object, but rather an unidentified mundane one.
bust_reasoning_zh: 该文件描述了两种主要视觉现象，两者均有充分的世俗解释支持。“闪光”是宇宙射线磷光现象的典型描述，这是太空环境中一种有充分记录的生理效应。“明亮的红色物体”被乘员自身确认为卫星或碎片，其观测到的行为（翻滚、亮度变化、相似轨道）与已知轨道物体完全一致。乘员未能具体识别该卫星，并不表明其为异常物体，而仅是一个未识别的世俗物体。
claims: Skylab 1/2 crew observed light flashes, spots, and streaks, possibly cosmic particles. Skylab 1/3 crew observed a bright reddish object, identified as a satellite in a similar orbit. The Skylab 1/3 object was much brighter than planets, had a reddish hue, rotated with a 10-second period, and was estimated 30-50 nautical miles away. Skylab 1/4 crew observed flashing lights with definite relative motion. Skylab 1/4 flashing lights were presumed to be Skylab debris or other satellites, some appearing to tumble.
claims_zh: 天空实验室1/2号乘员观测到闪光、斑点和条纹，可能为宇宙粒子。 天空实验室1/3号乘员观测到一个明亮的红色物体，被确认为一颗处于相似轨道的卫星。 天空实验室1/3号物体比行星亮得多，呈红色调，以10秒周期旋转，估计距离30-50海里。 天空实验室1/4号乘员观测到有明确相对运动的闪光。 天空实验室1/4号闪光被推测为天空实验室碎片或其他卫星，部分似乎在翻滚。

title: FBI Photo B1
summary: The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) submitted a report to the All-domain Anomaly Resolution Office (AARO) in 2025, consisting of a still image derived from a U.S. military system. The original imagery was altered with redactions, and no accompanying mission report was provided. The operator reported being unable to positively identify the UAP, and the date in the image was incorrect due to system settings. The monochrome, grainy image displays a central crosshair reticle and a small, dark, circular object in the upper right quadrant, against an indistinct mountain range or cloud formation.
summary_zh: 联邦调查局（FBI）于2025年向全域异常解决办公室（AARO）提交了一份报告，其中包含一张源自美国军事系统的静态图像。原始图像经过编辑和涂黑处理，且未提供随附任务报告。操作员报告称无法明确识别该UAP，图像中的日期因系统设置不正确。该单色、颗粒状图像显示一个中央十字线分划板，右上象限有一个小型、黑暗、圆形物体，背景为模糊的山脉或云层。
claims: FBI submitted a UAP report to AARO. Report includes a still image from a U.S. military system. Operator could not positively identify the UAP. Image date/time was incorrect. Image shows a small, dark, circular object.
claims_zh: 联邦调查局向AARO提交了一份UAP报告。 报告包含一张源自美国军事系统的静态图像。 操作员无法明确识别该UAP。 图像日期/时间不正确。 图像显示一个小型、黑暗、圆形物体。

title: FBI Photo B10
summary: The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) submitted a report of an unidentified anomalous phenomenon (UAP) to the All-domain Anomaly Resolution Office (AARO) in 2025. The report consisted of a still image derived from a U.S. military system. The original imagery was altered with redactions before being submitted to AARO, and an accompanying mission report was not provided. The operator reported that they were unable to positively identify the UAP. The date in the image (12/31/99) is incorrect due to system date/time not being set. The monochrome image displays a grainy texture with a central crosshair reticle, showing a small, dark, circular, blurry object just to the top right quadrant of the center of the reticle. The background shows an indistinct mountain range.

bust_reasoning: The document consists of a single, low-quality, grainy, black-and-white image of a small, blurry, circular object. There is no description of behavior, kinematics, or corroborating sensor data or witness accounts. This complete lack of detail and independent verification makes it impossible to rule out numerous mundane explanations, aligning with the highest bust score category.
bust_reasoning_zh: 该文件仅包含一张低质量、颗粒状的黑白图像，显示一个小型、模糊、圆形物体。报告中未描述其行为、运动学特征，亦无佐证的传感器数据或目击者证词。这种细节和独立验证的完全缺失，使得无法排除众多世俗解释，符合最高“揭穿”评分类别。
claims: FBI submitted a UAP report to AARO in 2025 Report included a still image from a U.S. military system Original imagery was altered with redactions No accompanying mission report was provided Operator was unable to positively identify the UAP The date displayed in the image (12/31/99) is incorrect due to system date/time not being set The image shows a small, dark, circular, blurry object
claims_zh: 联邦调查局于2025年向AARO提交了一份UAP报告 报告包含一张源自美国军事系统的静态图像 原始图像经过编辑和删节 未提供随附任务报告 操作员无法明确识别该UAP 图像中显示的日期（12/31/99）不正确，系因系统日期/时间未设置 图像显示一个小型、黑暗、圆形、模糊的物体

The object is described generically as 'small, dark, circular' with no described behavior or kinematics. This aligns directly with the 85-100 score anchor for single, low-quality images lacking corroboration or kinematic data.

title: USPER Statement about UAP Sighting
title_zh: 美国人员关于UAP目击事件的声明
summary: An FBI 302 interview with a senior US intelligence official detailing a UAP encounter at a US military facility in late 2025. During a helicopter search, a "super-hot" orb was spotted hovering, then traveled 20 miles at high speed, breaking into two objects. It reportedly came within ten feet of the helicopter. Later, a "swarm" of lights and multiple orbs (4-6) were observed by naked eye, NVG, and FLIR, appearing, flaring up and down, and forming various patterns over a 30-minute period.
summary_zh: 一份联邦调查局302号访谈记录，详细描述了一名美国高级情报官员于2025年末在美国军事设施内遭遇UAP的事件。在一次直升机搜寻过程中，发现一个“超热”球体悬停，随后以高速飞行20英里，并分裂成两个物体。据报告，它曾接近直升机至十英尺以内。随后，目击者通过肉眼、NVG和FLIR观察到“一群”光点和多个球体（4-6个），在30分钟内出现、上下闪烁并形成各种图案。
bust_reasoning: The document details multiple UAP sightings over several hours by multiple credible witnesses (senior intelligence officials, pilots) using multiple sensor modalities (naked eye, NVG, FLIR). Key anomalous features include an object described as 'super-hot' on FLIR, hovering at ground level, moving at a high rate of speed (too fast for helicopter pursuit), breaking into two objects, and coming within ten feet of the helicopter. Additionally, multiple orbs were observed in close proximity to the helicopter, exhibiting sequential flaring, forming geometric patterns, and reportedly pursuing military aircraft, all of which are incompatible with known prosaic explanations.
bust_reasoning_zh: 该文件详细描述了在数小时内由多名可信目击者（高级情报官员、飞行员）使用多种传感器模式（肉眼、NVG、FLIR）观察到的多次UAP目击事件。主要异常特征包括一个在FLIR上显示为“超热”的物体，在地面高度悬停，以高速移动（直升机无法追逐），分裂成两个物体，并接近直升机至十英尺以内。此外，在直升机附近观察到多个球体，表现出顺序闪烁、形成几何图案，并据报告追逐军用飞机，所有这些都与已知的普通解释不符。
claims: A "super-hot" orb was observed hovering at ground level. The orb traveled 20 miles at a speed too fast for helicopter pursuit. The orb broke into two objects and later came within ten feet of the helicopter. A "swarm" of lights was seen moving in all directions. Multiple orbs (4-6) appeared, described as oval, orange with white/yellow centers, flaring up and down in various formations (side-by-side, horizontal, triangle) over a 30-minute period.
claims_zh: 观察到一个“超热”球体在地面高度悬停。 该球体以直升机无法追逐的速度飞行了20英里。 该球体分裂成两个物体，随后接近直升机至十英尺以内。 观察到“一群”光点向各个方向移动。 多个球体（4-6个）出现，被描述为椭圆形，橙色，中心为白色/黄色，在30分钟内以各种编队（并排、水平、三角形）上下闪烁。
